title: I Can't Be Your Luna, I'm a Beta
description:
Cassandra is the youngest child to the alpha of the Blue Silver Pack by three minutes. Unlike her older twin brother, Nicholas, she is wild, goofy and opinionated. All of that changes on her 13th birthday. 
After Cassandra has a violent outburst in school, her father ships her away to live with family she has never met before halfway across the world. 
While there she finds it more beneficial since her uncle opens her eyes to the things her father hid from her.
However, two years pass when her father sends for her return, to be his beta with her brother.
The only problem with this is Cassandra is claimed by the ruthless alpha known only as V. Will there relationship work? Can Cassandra give up her new position to be Luna to a Mate she doesn't think is hers? Or will she find a way to balance the two roles in her life?
*Trigger Warning!!!* This story contains discussion of abuse, especially sexual abuse
Since I am writing the sequels I don't have the time to go to each individual chapter to put the trigger warnings but will do so in time. Thank you to Ghost8574 for bringing it to my attention. 

~~~~~

My AMAZING cover was made by xenomorphius
I 100% recommend if you need a cover :)
Also sequel is I Can't be your Luna, I'm a Warrior

But what will happen, will they have their happily ever after?

Will they forever act like rejected mates?

Or will something else occur?

title: His Wolf
description:
Her whole life she has only been sure of one thing. She was a dog. A pet that was used at her handler wished. She has been trained to fight and kill. She has been trained to be obedient. She has been broken and rebuilt into what they wanted her to be. To follow every command without question, to kill without hesitation.

But everything comes with a price.

He found her in the most unexpected way. He found her in a state that no one thought was possible. He found her on the brink of sanity.

He is an Alpha, she was trained to be nothing. He is determined to fix the damage that has been done and find the girl that is trapped under the damage that has been done to her body and mind.

But will he be able to? Or has she simply gone to feral?

title: Running from Fate
description:
Daemon is a werewolf. A werewolf who doesn't want to be one. He has everything though, or so it seems. Money and a perfect family. Except his dad is a drunk and his mom is abusive. But he puts on a fake smile and a sweatshirt to hide the bruises. He doesn't have many friends, and his only one doesn't really care that much anyways. Then things changed. 
  A weird feeling in his gut develops, and he's constantly on edge. Then he's forced to go to a birthday party where he finds the source of the weird feeling. His mate. His mate he doesn't want. His mate who is the next Alpha of a very strong pack. 
  Daemon runs. He runs far away from his home and his pack, suppressing his wolf and going into hiding. But he can't hide for long, because his mate is on the hunt for what is rightfully his.




*will be rewritten eventually*

title: Beneath The Moons Embrace
description:
Killian is a rare kind of omega-confident, headstrong, and fiercely independent. The last thing he expects is to find himself at the center of a mate bond with not one, but two charming vampire twins. Adrian is stoic and thoughtful, while Dante is all playful smiles and mischievous charm. Together, they couldn't be more different, yet somehow, they're perfect for him.

As Killian navigates this unexpected connection, he discovers that being mated doesn't mean losing himself. It means finding a family he never knew he needed. With humor, warmth, and plenty of bickering, Adrian, Dante, and Killian learn that love-like life-is a little messy, a lot unexpected, and completely worth it.

Fluff, laughter, and a touch of destiny await in Bound by Blood and Moonlight!

title: My Mate....The Alpha (new version)
description:
READ BOOK ONE : "MY MATE.....THE NERD" FIRST


Book 4 of the "My Mate......" series


Ryker Storm is the alpha of the Alpha is the Moonlit Oasis Pack. With the help of his pack, and family behind him, Ryker has become one of the most fierce Alphas in Canada but his pack comes no where near the SavageKing Pack. He's strong, kind, caring and is protective of those he loves and will kill and die for his Pack. At the age of 20, he has yet to find his mate though he's in no hurry to find them as his top priority is his pack. 

Preston SaintClaire is the son of Princeton and Jessie SaintClaire, the Betas of King Pack. He is close to his family and had a small group of friends at school. He's in his finally year of high school and plans to study medicine and become a pack doctor. At 18 he is at the age to find a mate but as of now he hasn't found them and was in no hurry either. His main focus was school. 

But what happens when Preston is invited to his friends', Benson and Luna, house and he suddenly scents an alluring scent that he's never smelt before? And what will Ryker do when his wolf chants mate and forces his feet in the direction of the intoxicating scent that he's smelt many times before but never found? Will the alpha and beta's son accept or reject each other when they realize who the other is once they're standing face to face?

title: Rejecting the Alpha
description:
I glared up at him my eyes narrowed, "Excuse me?" I was beyond livid by the words that just came out of his mouth. My glare didn't falter when Parker towered over me, clenching his jaw while trapping me against his desk. 
  
"You heard me."
  
Parker's voice was low and intimidating that it made me feel so small. But I wasn't going to let him get to me. 
  
Standing up taller, I snapped, "I will not be your personal toy, available for you to do just as you please! I do not want to be held captive against my will, and not even have a say in anything. To be honest, I don't even want a mate."
  
"You will do everything and anything I say, do you hear me?" Parker growled grabbing my chin and forcing me to look at him.
  
Without even thinking I said the first thing that came to my head but meant every word.
  
"I, Jasmine Davis, reject you Alpha Parker Mason, as my mate."
  
  *
  
  Jasmine Davis is the daughter of the Beta of the Moonlit Waters Pack. She's sarcastic and having a mate is that last thing on her mind. Jasmine gets the attention of most of the male population in her pack but she ignores them.
  
  What happens when Jasmine's mate happens to be the ruthless Alpha of the neighboring pack, the Lunar Shadow Pack. What happens when she doesn't want a mate especially, Alpha Parker?
  
  *

[Highest rank: #1]
  
[WARNING] - mild language and some steamy scenes*
  
[Unedited] Read at your own risk!

title: Unexpected Surprises
description:
Ariana Belle was the typical quiet girl. She was the weak link in the ferocious Crimson Pack. She was shunned by everyone except for two people, her sister and her bestfriend. But her life changed when she turned 16 and was forced to go to a pack party, her family hoping for her to find her beloved mate. She didn't expect to actually find him. She didn't expect for him to be the future Alpha. She didn't expect to sleep with him. She didn't expect him to reject her for the packs strongest she-wolf. Most of all she didn't expect to end up with two little surprises, causing her to move to Florida with her mother. But after she's forced to go back to her pack after four years what's going to happen to her and her two little angels ? Is the feared Alpha going to find out about his children? Will he fight for them or reject them like he rejected Ariana?

title: Alpha's Little Goddess
description:
Ophelia is a timid girl trying her best to get through college debt and staying asleep in her classes. While it would be nice, she doesn't have time for a relationship or boys. So she wasn't exactly looking for one when she met the mayor of the sweet little town called Springfield. 

Xavier has lived a long...loveless life as a hybrid Alpha werewolf. He has gone years believing he'd never find his other half. The thought made him distant and resulted in him experiencing in temporary pleasures that are given to him. 

That all changed when he met the little goddess at the small diner in Springfield. Her scent was so different and alluring than the rest that he instantly knew he had to choose her as his forever partner. Will he be able to convince her to give up her normal life for immortality with him? Or will the human reject him, leaving him to be lonely for eternity? 

Maybe...but the real question is...

Does she really have a choice?

nova lives in a sea of grey. her world is a dull canvas, bleak and lifeless. 

having grown up with an unorthodox background, in a poor urban town with a father that was nowhere near the father she deserved, nova has always been alone. 

she paves her own way in life and makes decisions for only herself, because no one ever made them in mind of her. she wants to leave the shitty town she's in and make something of herself.

title: Marked By The Moon
description:
[BxB]
"What are you doing out here?" a towering figure asked, his voice sharp and bitter. "Don't you know the woods aren't safe at night?"

Jace squinted into the darkness, trying to make out the speaker. "I'm sorry," he stammered, brushing dirt off his arm as he sat on the cold ground. "I got lost."

_____________________________

In Everwood, everyone knows the forest is treacherous, especially after sunset. Legends of a mysterious mansion hidden deep within the woods have kept townsfolk on edge for generations. But Jace Sawyer has never believed in those old stories.

At eighteen, Jace runs through the forest every evening, dismissing his father's and grandparents' warnings as nothing more than superstition. After all, nothing bad has ever happened during his runs-until the night he strays too far and gets lost.

What Jace discovers in the shadows will change his life forever...

title: The rightful Luna
description:
*
'I-I am sorry your highness I touched ...!' She was trying to apologize, but she fell silent as she could not utter with her mouth that she accidentally touched his lips.
'But I am not sorry!' He said calmly looking straight at her.
 What was she supposed to say after hearing his words?
'I did not mean to touch your highness's ...' she said with great difficulty.
'That was not a touch.' He said not permitting her to brush it off as an accident, even though it clearly was.
'It was a kiss.' He said with a hoarse determined voice.
She widened her eyes, as her face flushed even more than it did when she realized what she had done. He dared to say the word she avoided.
'That was not! I...' she tried to refute. 
'What is a kiss Celia?' 
She could not answer. How could she say the definition of a kiss with her own mouth, it would only confirm his words.
*
'It was an accident. I am truly sorry, I did not mean any discourtesy towards your highness. If I can make up for my error somehow?' She quickly said. She did not know of his personal life, as he had a tight security around him and nobody knew much of the king outside official visits and business. He must have felt insulted.
'Please don't call it an accident. For a first kiss of a person to be called an accident ...' He said again with a dejected tone, but did not continue. It was like he had already gotten his point across.
'Ahhh. I am so sorry! It really was an ...' She wanted to say accident but, because of his pleading she could not actually say it. To have committed the blame of taking the king's first kiss and then not acknowledging it, how would he think of her?
At this point she did not even realize that their roles had reversed, or that it was her first kiss also.

PS: If you like loyal mates... then please proceed further :D

title: The Alpha's Mistake
description:
"B-but we... we're m-mates..."

"Look. You were a good fling but I hate even the slightest thought of you being my mate and The Lunar Moon Pack's Luna. Which is why: "I Dmitri Kingston, reject you Ariana Descartes as my mate and future Luna."



"I-I ... Ariana Descartes accept your r-rejection as your m-mate and future L-Luna of the Lunar Moon Pack".




"Good. Now get out".



~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Meet Dmitri Kingston: 
Heartless, rule breaker, heartbreaker, bad boy and next in line to be Alpha of the Lunar Moon Pack. In other words a complete player, with the looks of a Greek god and an ego bigger than our universe it was no surprise that fate had played a game with him by choosing Ariana Descartes to be his mate.




Meet Ariana Descartes: 
Shy, good girl, rule follower, humble, and in general a kind, helping person. In other words the complete opposite of Dmitri Kingston. 


The day she goes to Dmitri's 18th birthday was when her life changed. All she had ever dreamed of since she was a young girl, was to find her mate and live a happy life with him. But that changed when she met Dmitri. 


Now Ari is rejected and pregnant-by her ex-mate Dmitri. Not wanting any trouble she flees to the human world for guaranteed safety for herself and her unborn daughter. And for 3 years she lives in a quiet serene environment with her beautiful daughter Elora.

But there's a catch to it. Ari has to come back for a few days to visit her sick father, which means that Elora will have to accompany her. 

Has Dmitri fixed his player ways?
 
How will everyone else react to her appearing off the radar for 5 and a half years?


But most importantly: is Ari ready to face her mate who rejected her after a night of 'fun'?


#onenightstand- 69 on 28/7/20

Cover by @mybooksaretrash

title: Haunted {Dean Winchester 1}
description:
He was so, so close, dangerously so. I couldn't bring myself to pull back, to break eye contact. I was entranced by him. He kept me there, locked in his intense gaze. His eyes burned with something I hadn't seen ever before. Or maybe I just hadn't noticed. 
"Penny for your thoughts, Si?" Dean's breath fanned my face, making me pull in a breath of my own. I needed to step back before I couldn't control myself.
You. But I wouldn't tell him that. I couldn't. For one, his ego did not need it. Two, I was scared. I was terrified that this would go too far and it wouldn't work out.
"Wouldn't you like to know?" The words slip past my lips faster than I can stop them. That seemed to happen around him. I couldn't control the things I say or do. Normally, I had the best self-control a person could hope for. 
But Dean...he was able to rip that to pieces with just one look, one word.
Dean chuckles and my body warmed at the sound. He stepped closer.
His body brushed mine now and I couldn't breathe. But the burn in my lungs felt nice. 
Dean looked at me for a few moments. I could see the wheels turning in his head. What was he thinking about? I desperately wanted to know.
"Screw it." He muttered before leaning down and kissing me.
___

Saige Dawson was a longtime friend of the Winchesters, the eldest brother especially despite the fact she was two years younger than him. She'd always had a tiny crush on him, not that'd she's admit it.  And definitely not to him. John would bring his sons to her father's farm where they'd spend a week or two every once in a while. Saige had grown up hunting and with the Winchesters. 
She'd opened up to Dean, shared all her secrets and spilled her entire life story. He did the same. 
So one day when he stops by for a visit and tells her that John was missing, Saige had to help. John was like a second father figure for her. She couldn't just leave him hanging. And she couldn't leave Dean hanging either. He needed her help. So she would help.

title: My Alpha Mate's A Baby Thief
description:
He wants her back. Not because he misses her, not because he's realised Allison was the bitch she warned him she was, and definitely not because he loves her but because he is slowly going blind and she is the only one who can treat him. 

He has what is called "Lunaris Blindness." The disease is linked to the unique physiology of alpha werewolves. Though, it also affects normal werewolves in some cases. It's triggered by a genetic mutation that affects the cells in the retina, making them more sensitive to the moon's intense light during the transformation. If not treated early, it may lead to permanent blindness.

How did he get it? Hereditary? Infection? Or Curse?

Noone knows.

But one thing is certain. He is going blind and as much as he hates to say or admit it, she is the only person who can save him.

title: The Hellhound's Mate
description:
When Jordan Parrish was drawn to the small town of Beacon Hills, he never expected to find the existence of the supernatural there. He never intended to find out that he was supernatural there. And he especially didn't expect to find her there. 
Angie Stilinski is the fiery daughter of the Sheriff, and the last person he was ever expected to kiss, much less fall in love with. But when she turns out to be the only person able and willing to help him discover what he is and how to control his powers, Jordan discovers that he has absolutely no control over how he feels about Angie.
Similarly, Angie Stilinski has been through a lot, more than maybe even the Hale's some might say. And her past has left her guarded to everyone but her father, baby brother and childhood best friend, at least until Jordan comes around.
But despite their ability to always find each other and a connection neither one can explain, in a town like Beacon Hills, there's no such thing as a fairytale happy ending.

title: His Golden Eyes (BxB)
description:
"I don't understand what you're talking about" I gulped, backing away from the large, and I have to admit extremely sexy, man.

"Oh baby, you're so adorable," he chuckled, "What I'm saying is that we're meant to be together forever. You belong with me and I'm going to keep you safe."

With fear creeping up on me, I tried to run past him but he easily caught me. I tried to fight back, but he was like a statue compared to me. "My sweet little mate don't you get it? You're mine."

~☆~

Jamie Lovett is a junior in highschool and has lived a practically normal life in his small town up until now. He has been keeping a deep secret his whole life that he hasn't told a lot of people yet... he's gay. Jamie just wants to make it through high school so he can truly go live his life at college but an unexpected man comes into his life that flips his world upside down. This man just so happens to be his friend's older brother.

Eric Jarvis is the soon to be Alpha of the Kingsdale pack, he's almost 19 and extremely cocky and athletic but longs to find that special someone to spend the rest of his life with. Luckily there's a blood moon on his birthday and that night he'll finally be able to find his mate and hopefully be crowned Alpha soon. 

Things spiral out of control when supernatural creatures start attacking Jamie and his friends, so it's up to the werewolves and the witches to stop an evil curse from devouring the town. At the same time Jamie has to make some choices about how he wants his life to turn out and Eric has to do everything in his power to protect his little mate from the dangerous world he brought Jamie into.

Read on to find out what happens!

title: My Heartbreak (Rejection Series #1)
description:
BOOK ONE TO THE "Rejection Series" 
  
  Ellie Martin had been harassed and ignored since the age of 13. She was once the child that always smiled, always laughed and always had fun.

Now she's the girl that cowers in the corner, stays out of sight, and is picked on. She's now the girl that doesn't have fun anymore, doesn't smile whenever and is depressed all the time. 

The soon to be alpha and ex-best friend, Aidan is the ring master of all her misery. But what happens when her mate turns out to be the Aidan himself. No, this isn't the story where the Alpha rejects her and she runs off joins, another pack and comes back reformed. This story is where Aidan regrets everything and accepts her, but Ellie, his own mate is hesitant and untrusting of him. 

And because of that she reluctantly rejects him before he has the chance to say anything. This is the story where Aidan trys to regain Ellie's trust. This is the story where Aidan trys to make his mate the girl she once was, even though he's heartbroken everyday when he sees his mate. His story where he's heartbroken everyday, reminded that he had caused his mate this pain. 

This is the story of Aidan and Ellie's heartbreak.

title: a thousand instincts (#1)
description:
Life Lesson #1: If you are planning on going to a nightclub in the middle of sketchy, dark woods, don't.  

Life Lesson #2: If there are too many attractive, healthy people in said nightclub, be alarmed and rethink Life Lesson #1. 

Life Lesson #3: If you were foolish enough to ignore rules 1 and 2, I suggest you haul ass. 

Aeress is one of those special people who obviously need a couple more life lessons...

-----------------------------------------------------------------

     He chuckled. It was dry but it was an addictive sound. "No," he brought his nose against her collar, "not at all." His lips skimmed over her exposed skin. She sighed at his touch, riding the sweet, overwhelming waves that came with.

     "You've barely touched me," Aeress had her hands skimming up the back of his neck and in between his strands. "And I'm falling apart."

     His voice was a little hollow and this worried her. "The bond we have is responsible for that."

     She tugged at him until he looked up. For a moment she just basked in how handsome he was. "I don't think so," she leaned in for a kiss, "I think that you are just about the most fascinating man I have ever met. And we have only just met. I don't think a bond can simply erase the will of an independent woman like me."

     His eyes came to life with a blazing fire. He closed the distance between them and kissed sensation back into her body, setting off every nerve in her flesh. Everything came to a boiling point, sizzling with need. 

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

°°MATURE AND EXPLICIT CONTENT OF ALL KINDS, AND I MEAN ALL KINDS°°

After beginning my journey on Wattpad about 9 years ago, I've finally come to the point in my life where I am ready to pursue real representation and publication for my fantastical worlds. title: Sweet Little Serena (Rewrite)
description:
The greatest Shadowhunter of his generation is what they say about the legendary Jace Wayland. But, what you don't know, is that they also say the same of his twin sister, Serena. Having grown up together, the four of them made a promise that whenever they go on a mission, four go in and four come out. 
Join them as they fight to keep that promise when their world is turned upside down by the introduction of Clary Fairchild, the fiery daughter of the biggest threat to the Shadow World, Valentine Morgenstern.

title: Fill Me, Alpha
description:
Marisol tried to live life to the fullest. She attended Rochester University and studied International Studies and Economics. After graduating, she attended law school at the University of Southern California and pursued a career in cooperate law. She held herself to a higher standard, maybe that was because she became blind after a traumatic accident. She didn't want her disability to rule her life, so she ruled her disability, never allowing it to hinder her success.

Yet, even though she'd become a successful attorney, she never married and never had children. Feeling unfulfilled, yet completely unready to take care of a child by herself, she applies to become a surrogate.

After many denials, her application was finally chosen by someone.

Little did she know she was chosen by Grey Weston, one of America's most eligible bachelors with a hidden secret.

Completed.

title: Mated to My Bestfriend's Boyfriend
description:
EMMA RUBY FOREST. 
You know the perfect girl, with blonde hair, blue eyes, who is desired by almost every guy, also dating the  future Alpha, yeah that's not me, that's is my bestfriend, Rosalie Walker.

Me? Well I do have blonde hair but I'm the one who is never noticed in her group, the shy, akward girl, yeah that is me. Not that I'm complaining, I'm perfectly happy with it, my mum and dad working in the hospital as doctor and nurse, my brother who is a pain in the ass but also very caring, amazing friends, and then there is Ethan my Bestfriend's Boyfriend and my crush. 

There was a time when everything was just more perfect, when me and Ethan were best-friends, but then we grew up and unfortunately we grew apart and; I was left with these feelings for him.

Nobody knows about it and they don't have to, because at the end of the day it's just a little crush, right?

*       *       *          

ETHAN STEVEN PRESTON. 
The future Alpha of Golden moon pack, I can say my life is tough, full of problems but that'd be a lie, I've got loving parents, loyal friends, an amazing girlfriend and also almost every girl in the pack wanting me, either for my power or for my looks, well every girl but her. And the thing is, I only want her.

 Emma has been my girl since I can remember, but I have to maintain my distance because of her stupid overprotective brother Zach, who is also my bestfriend.Nobody can know about my crush on her, neither her brother nor my girlfriend or I'd be into deep, very deep trouble. 

But I don't think they'll have to know about it because at the end of the day it's just a little crush, right?

title: The Elemental Mate
description:
Book #2 of The Soulmate Series

After being sentenced to death from her fellow witches, Aurora escapes into wolf territory where she is almost killed by the rogue, Cortez. Left for dead, Aurora needs a miracle and a miracle is exactly what finds her. 

Alpha Xander has been leading his pack without a mate for almost five years and he is starting to lose hope that he will ever find her. He wanted needed a miracle. After attending a meeting between the packs, Xander finds his miracle.

The witch covens are circling. The wolf packs are on high alert. Both sides are prepared for war, but at what cost?

Can Xander find another miracle to keep Aurora safe from the coven who wants her dead?

title: You, Me and Penny Green | Edward Cullen
description:
"Everything has a purpose and a reason, I believe it so."

Many have tried and failed to get under Iris' skin. Whether it be calling her gruesome names and spreading nasty rumors about her teenage pregnancy. Or maybe, it would be about her deadbeat ex-boyfriend who now presides in prison. They've even tried to go as low as gossiping about how her parents kicked her out when they found out they're precious daughter gave her virtue to a delinquent. All these things were, in fact, true; yet Iris remained full of love and nurturing to the living things around her. 

But what happens when she meets a family of the undead? Will she accept them with open arms or will she run for the hills, after all, she has a daughter to consider now.
.   .   .

Book One: Set during Twilight ~ New Moon (Completed Feb 23, 2019) *Don't worry the spelling/grammar mistakes are being edited!*

Book Two: Set during Eclipse ~ Breaking Dawn 1 & 2 (Completed July 31, 2019)

All Rights Reserved for my characters, other than that, I give all other rights to Stephanie for creating a supernatural world we continue to write stories about.

    --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    
    It takes more than a bite. 
    
    Charlotte has gone from being a broken human to a strong she-wolf and a damn Thorne, but now she and her mate, are standing on the edge of deliverance or doom as they grapple with a revelation that changes everything. 
    
    They have to move fast to protect the ones they love, protect their pack, and most of all each other; but will it be enough? Will they rise to the occasion or fade into ash as the fires of failure lick them up?
    
    There's will be blood. There will be your two favorite vampires and a lot of good food. There will be ass beatings, twists, turns, and whole lotta Levi.

title: Bite Me.
description:
The Canadian wilderness. A vast forest filled with animals large and small. Wolves, deer, mountain lions, moose, lynxes... and bears. 
This is the story about a bear. Not just any bear but a polar bear, the largest carnivore on the planet. More specifically, Avery Nanuk a polar bear shifter. Avery Nanuk lives a calm peaceful life as a school nurse working in a school built just for shifters like him. He was found as a cub out in the woods many years before and was adopted into a small wolf pack up in the northern reaches of Canada. Avery has grown up as the only bear shifter in the area and has grown used to the fact of living alone. All Avery wants is a normal and peaceful life living out in the woods in his cozy little cabin and his outdoor swimming pool. But the fates have something else in store. The fates send a bear sized wrecking ball into Avery's once peaceful life. And that wrecking ball's name is Rick Kodiak.  


*WARNING: THIS STORY IS MANXMAN! DON'T LIKE IT! DON'T READ IT! PLEASE RESPECT THIS STORY AND DO NOT WRITE HATEFUL COMMENTS!
ALL OTHERS, ENJOY!

title: Mama Hale -A Derek Hale Fanfiction ~~REWRITE~~
description:
Lyrica Hale, the wife of Derek Hale, teaches Musical History at Beacon Hills High School. She's a werewolf, bitten and turned at the age of 14. The day she was turned, a mark appeared on the base of her neck, replacing the nasty bite. She had no clue what it was, a confusing black triskele with a bunch of letters around it. She tried to ignore it, until she met Derek and Laura Hale when she was 16, and everything fell into place. Lyrica and Derek move from their happy home in Ohio back to the place that brought Derek so much pain, when his older sister, Laura, calls for help.

Lyrica and Derek were never used to being around a lot of people. So, understandably, they're a little overwhelmed when so many teenagers begin relying on them.

//Hello! If you're reading this, I assume you have already read Mama Hale, the original draft of this story. If so, welcome to a MUCH better version of the story you all love. If you haven't read the story, that's okay! This one is more or less the same, just fixed up and written better. The sequel, The Mother of Beacon Hills, will still match up with this version of Mama Hale. This story WILL follow the Teen Wolf T.V. show. Enjoy!//

title: Oh my baby witch (taekook)✅
description:
"Did you really have to crash-land on me ?" the owner of the cottage asked irritably. "And wait, were you flying on this broom?"

"I am really sorry, mister," the little innocent witch answered with his sweetest voice and an undeniable pout, still a little embarrassed that he had fallen on the handsome mister while trying to fly on a broom.

"Are you planning to freeze out here? Come inside, little witch."
The little witch's eyes shone with gratitude as the owner welcomed him inside in the middle of the snowy woods.

"Thank you so much, mister," he gladly thanked the owner as he entered.

What will happen when an alpha wolf meets a cute little witch? Lots of fun and fluff unfolds. So, let's dive into the story of a wolf (Tae) and his baby witch (Koo).

Top: Tae
Bottom: Koo 

English is not my first language.

title: Is This Hell?
description:
When Alexandra died, in the most boring everyday way possible, she never expected to wake up again.

It is time for a new King and Queen to rise.
_____________________________________

They said I wasn't ready. They said I wasn't smart nor strong enough to lead as Queen. The weight of our world was on my shoulders and it was slowly killing me. I was hated before I had even begun. 

What I didn't know was what the future held: a mate. A king to rule beside me. Little did I know that mate would be the most feared man to walk our grounds. They feared him and now they will fear us. 

I am the Queen and he is my king: The Lycan.

And together, we will rule.

title: Meant to Be (Derek Hale)
description:
Mia stared up at Derek in confusion. "What are you thanking me for?"

"For giving me a family and making me the happiest man alive." He said. "I didn't think that I'd ever get to be happy after losing you and then losing my family. I hated the world for taking away the people I cared for the most. But, then you came back and it felt like maybe I could be happy again. Its why I'm grateful to have you back in life. It's why I'm thanking you."

"Derek..." Mia felt tears swell up in her eyes and grabbed his face, smashing their lips together. She kept her forehead pressed to his. "I'm happy you followed me that day into the music room." She said quietly, her eyes shone with love as she stared at the man she loved.
  
  
  
  
  A/N: There will be no Paige. 
  
  Seasons (3-4)

title: The Princess's Guard ✔️
description:
*Formerly His Desire*

"You think you want me, but I don't think you could handle what I would do to you." His stare is relentless. 

I smooth my hands down over my nightdress, feeling his words glide across my skin. "I could..."

"I'm not sure I would be the kind, gentle lover your sweet Caspian would be," he warns quietly. 

-----

As a Princess, Kiva is always in danger. 

So much so, one night, her home is broken into, where it is revealed her attempted killer is her mate. 

Before she has a chance to speak to him, he vanishes into the night. 

For her protection, a dark and dangerous mercenary is ordered to keep guard of her, and as time passes, Kiva finds herself desiring him more and more. 

All while trying to find her elusive mate, and deny feelings for a man who may lead her right to the truth.

The Cullen's were having their peaceful night when they heard a knock on their door. Esme and Carlisle walk downstairs and opened the front door to see a beautiful angel staring up at them with doe eyes.



"What's your name?" Carlisle asked as he crouches down in front of the shy little girl as Esme took interest and adoration towards the shy girl.

"Mary." She mumbles hiding behind her porcelain doll making Carlisle smile at her.

"Beautiful name."

title: Heart of Stone (Parts I & II)
description:
[COMPLETE] Some bonds can't be broken, even in death.

--

He couldn't endure another heartbreak.
"Accepting her would be a mistake," he said. "She's a human. I can't afford to have her blood on my hands."
Gwen looked away, and he knew she saw the image that flashed in his mind.
The slaughter. Bodies everywhere. The putrid stench of decay and metallic blood seeping through his fingers and staining the earth under his feet. The small, lifeless body in his hands whose death he couldn't prevent.
And whose death he could never forget.
"It won't be like that with her," she murmured to the floor.
"I won't take that chance."
Heavy with sorrow, her brown eyes looked up into his. "Not everyone is given a second chance. Take it."

--

Soulmates only come along once in a lifetime.
Or so everyone thought.
She was his second chance.
But her heart loved another.
Fate would bring them together, and Fate would tear them apart.

--

**A slow-burning, sensual love story with a splash of humor, a dash of action, and a lot of heart.**

Rated PG-13 for adult content (coarse language, violence, and non-explicit sex)
[There is a separate R-rated scenes book for those who want steamier scenes]

CONTAINS: alpha lycan x human mates, strong female lead, second chance mates, reincarnation (tabula rasa), love-triangles, vampires, action, drama, humor, relatable characters, high stakes, passionate romances

VOID OF: "insta-love," extremely possessive, aggressive, abusive alpha mates, Stockholm Syndrome

*OVERALL WINNER of 2017 Flower's Awards*

title: Queen of his Heart - [Editing]
description:
Queen of his Heart. ~A novella by Nasreen Akther.
___________________________________________________

Description....

He is the King.

The leader and present head of every sector of earth whom everybody had to obey, be it werewolves or humans. 

In the time of chaos, he brought light to the war crazed and protected the earth inhabitants from massacre. 

Everyone thought of him then as a Savior. The Light. 

But he turned to be the king of manipulation and darkness. 

He fed on evil to bring down destruction. Nobody on the whole of the all realms can be as Bloodthirsty and Cruel than him.

People's life meant nothing to his Psycho manipulative mind.

Until she came. A naive beauty who didn't understand bloodlust. So his crazy blood killings turned into magic to amuse her. To keep her enchanted in the magic woven little world he made for her. 

She meant everything to him. The very core of his shrouded existence was her. 

Fate forbid, if he lost her, which he won't ever let happen, the whole world will be crying in the face of his chaos and destruction. Cause he cared for none. Only her. 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~


"You were warned you fools, 
The Prophecy of my imergence was revealed by your ancestors. 
But you all chose to neglect and forget it. 
So I came back to take my throne....
BUT don't ever and ever forget, 
That now I have a Queen. 
And the moment she fidgets in discomfort because of you measly mortals, your whole existence will be veiled with the melting lava of cruel darkness. 

~ King Azazel, the strongest ruler in history of Earth. 

The story is a product wholly based on the imagination of the author. It has no intent to insult or oppose any religion or belief. This is a fictional story made for the sole purpose of reading.

title: delicate
description:
He hummed, amused. I was growing impatient. "I want you to have sex with me. Whenever I want. For as long as I want."

I furrowed my brows. "Seriously?"

He stepped closer, our bodies dangerously close to one another. "Seriously." He tilted his head. "A non-committal, strictly sexual relationship." His eyes were trained on my lips. "Fuck buddies." His eyes found mine again.

I reached behind me slowly for the gun. "I haven't even had sex with you, how do I know if you're good or not?"

He leaned down, his lips ghosting over mine. My breath was stuck in my throat. "Why don't we find out?"

description:
"The past fabricates our exposition, but it is not the whole story."

      Having the well known and beloved Alice as her twin, Hannah has always had big shoes to fill. Of course, they were two peas in a pod. There was not one without the other. Alice foresaw the future whilst Hannah could reveal anyone's entire past with just a touch.
      Although she was born two minutes later, she always made it a point to watch over her sister - take care of her sister. Then out of the blue, a tall - golden haired, southern talking prince charming decided he was going to take care of her from here on out.

      This is the story of when Jasper Hale coincidently stumbled upon time's temptress.

title: If only, Damon Salvatore
description:
In the town of mystic falls it's always been a quaint town but what some people don't know is that for decades it has been the home of supernatural beings from werewolves to witches to vampires. Although the vampires had disappeared from the town, the werewolves seemed to gone extinct, but the witches stuck around.

Especially the Black family who are one of the most powerful witch covens to date, but when vampires come back into town, the signs of it are a whole lot major for them then the town, especially when the Salvatore brothers start sticking their noses in their direction.

Where Damon the brooding, destructive older brother who's there to what seems to only cause trouble finds his eyes and himself drawn to the youngest witch both of them end up asking themselves why, especially when their species  are supposed to be enemies.

title: Unleashed ↠ Elijah Mikaelson
description:
"Are you mental? We have locked these kinds of people here for hundreds of years for a reason"

"I know; but she is our last resort"


In the years when New Orleans had been under the control of the Mikaelson's, the city had been split into the different supernatural factions; sending everything into chaos. In a desperate bid to gain the upper hand and/or form alliances, Elijah and his family sought to find the kind of people nobody ever talks about.

They stumbled upon only one though; a witch who could not practice magic unless she took it from another. She had been pushed out into the outskirts of the town for being different. However; that was not the only reason, and the Mikaelson's would not find out until it was much too late.

Now, with a combined threat to the Mikaelson family, they need to make the decision whether it's worth risking unleashing what they have locked away for years to finally defeat their enemy.

title: The Alphas rebellious Mate.
description:
almost a hundred years ago, the beasts in the shadows, known as werewolves, made themselves known, their attack was so unexpected, no one even knew they existed till the night sky was blazing a deep orange with the fires from destruction across the world as they completely ravaged different areas of powers. 

Humans were no match to counter them so suddenly, countless lives were lost on both sides, mostly on the humans. 

Humans were more resilient than the beasts expected, meaning the war that began lasted much longer, surprising the murderous creatures that had sought to crush any and all resistance from the humans. Their beasts were determined to make the world run on their instinctual and genetic hierarchy, to them it was the best way to live one with the world, saying it was a given right of life from their precious 'moon goddess'. 

But despite losing the main war for control, human determination was not so easily squashed out, a resistance was set up in areas that lacked wolf control over the globe.

The world was split and changed to suit the bests, pack territories drawn out, all unified under the council of unified supreme alphas, each having control over a different continent, though luckily for humans wolves liked to stick in their communities, which left many islands and smaller land masses open for human control, only visited once every year by patrols, meaning the rebellion had different hidden bases all over. 

But what happens when the alpha supreme Damien Steele, the scariest of the seven supreme alphas, finds his mate. 

A human girl, and not just any human girl. 

Ashley Harper, otherwise known as the rebellions 'ghost' 

Will the two learn to work out their differences after finding out the moon goddess has linked their souls as mates, both too stubborn to submit easily.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

"I know you're here little ghost...I can smell your scent everywhere" 

"then why don't you try catching me, coward"

"oh darling...with pleasure~"

title: The Death of a Time Viewer (COMPLETED)
description:
Morgianna Salieri is an average girl. She makes good grades, never gets in trouble, and works hard in her martial arts. Everything is normal except, she has been able to see how much time a person has left if she looks at them with her left eye.
She was born with one red eye and one that from a distance looks gold, however, on closer inspection it looks like an antique clock.
One day after class while walking home with her best friend she watches as all her time disappears as a truck heads right for her. Without thinking twice she pushes her friend out of the way trading her places.
What should have been her end became her new beginning as she wakes up in a world where magic and beasts are around every corner.

description:

Meet Arlo, Scott half brother, through his father. When Rafael goes to Beacon Hills to investigate the serial murders, Arlo comes with him, determined to protect his brother. But Arlo gets thrown into a werewolf war and gets caught up in his feelings for his brother's best friend.

Caspian Finstock had known for a while, he had known that Isaac Lahey would take a while to get over. He hadn't known that werewolves and other supernatural creatures were an issue in their town. But if that's the cost of staying with the people he loves, Caspian will pay it everytime. 

Season 3- 5

𝐃𝐞𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐝 𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐝 𝐟𝐚𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐦𝐚𝐤e 𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐬, 𝐬𝐡𝐞 𝐧𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐥𝐞𝐝 𝐮𝐩 𝐢𝐧 𝐲𝐞𝐭 𝐚𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐬𝐮𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐥 𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐭 𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐦.

Ivory Lahey was bitten in sophomore year along side her brother, except she isn't exactly the same as him. But when he stayed in France, she went back to the supernatural infested town of Beacon Hills. Now she has to deal with falling in love with a Chimera with secrets.

title: SPY ✔︎ 𝘿𝙀𝙍𝙀𝙆 𝙃𝘼𝙇𝙀
description:
Spy || Derek Hale

When the troublemaking trio ventured into the woods that night to uncover the truth behind a buried body, the plan unraveled quickly. Stiles' sharp tongue and bad timing landed him in the back of his father's patrol car, leaving Hazel McCall and her brother, Scott, alone to face the dark unknown. As the siblings pressed on without their friend, the oppressive silence of the forest turned sinister. And then they saw them-two glowing, blood-red eyes piercing through the shadows. For Scott, it was a fateful encounter that would change his life forever.

Meanwhile, Hazel's own journey took a different turn. A series of strange, inexplicable events led her to Derek Hale, the brooding and enigmatic werewolf with a dangerous past. Their initial meeting was anything but friendly, shrouded in suspicion and the weight of secrets. But as Hazel's path continued to intersect with Derek's, an unlikely connection began to form.

Over time, Derek became an unwilling protector to Hazel, and she, in turn, became one of the few to glimpse the humanity buried beneath his hardened exterior. Each season of chaos brought them closer-whether through shared battles, unexpected alliances, or moments of vulnerability that neither expected to share.

But as Hazel grew more entrenched in the supernatural world, she couldn't help but wonder if her connection with Derek would be her salvation-or her undoing. For in Beacon Hills, trust could be as dangerous as any monster lurking in the woods.














STARTED: 14.04.22

ENDED: 19.10.24





TEEN WOLF: 1-6

title: Aconite - Dramione/Blinny
description:
"What do you want, Malfoy?" She asked angrily.

He tutted at her as he sat down. "Is that any way to treat a client?"

Her brow furrowed as she narrowed her eyes. "If you're here to waste my time, I'm going to ask you to leave."

"I would never waste your time," He answered, leaning sideways in the chair and bringing up one leg to rest his ankle over his knee, smiling at her. "I do have an actual problem that you need to help me with."

"From the way I see it, I don't need to help you with anything," She retorted. "Now, I will ask again: what do you want?"

He sighed and shook his head slightly. "You will need to help me, actually, unless you want an unstable werewolf at the next full moon."

She stared at him, her mouth dropping slightly. "You've got to be joking."

His expression turned more serious. "I most certainly am not, Granger."

"You're a werewolf."




Brand new story! Takes after the theory of Draco being bitten by Fenrir Greyback after Lucius failed to retrieve the prophecy, and the story takes place 5 years after the battle in 2003. Enjoy everyone!

title: The New Boy in Town
description:
This is going to be set in the summer before fifth year at Hogwart's. Harry had always believed in Dumbledore and never doubted him that is until he was forced into the triwizard tournament by said man. While Dumbledore had left him all alone in the hell he was forced to participate in he thought that his friends would stick by him through all of this, but no they turned on him thinking that he had put his name in to get him even more fame than he already had.  Ron was the jealous one while Hermione was the one thinking that he had broken some rules to do something that would give him yet another adventure. Harry was then left to rely on the only person that was willing to help him and that was 'Alastor Moody' aka Barty Crouch Jr. As Harry was getting the help of an actual adult that cared for him and seemed like he wanted him to survive they got closer. Barty soon told Harry everything but Harry didn't really care mainly because at least they had never lied to him or with held information form him. So while it got closer to the last task Harry was real close friends with Barty and they had already brought Voldemort back to his former glory of Tom Riddle. Tom and Barty had found out that Harry was Tom's accidental Horcrux they couldn't really fix it without killing Harry and as it was they both thought of him as their family. So when that last task arrived Harry didn't take the cup but Cedric did and he had won while Harry and Barty had 'mysteriously' disappeared. They both arrived with there things in front of Gringott's with Tom already waiting on them and this is where the story begins.

title: The Refugee's Mate (Werewolf Story)
description:
Liam Forsythe was not dealt an easy hand. On the day he was born, his dad, family and their entire wolf pack were massacred by a rival. The only reason his mother even survived it's because she got into labor moments before the strike happened.

With no family or mate left, his mom was forced to move into another pack to raise him. Growing up, Liam got into a lot of trouble. And even upon turning 18, he didn't find his mate anywhere which only aggravated the situation.

One day, trouble proves too much for him as he got mixed up with the Alpha's son, who all but kills him in retaliation. Desperate, his mom does the unthinkable and apply for sanctuary in the oddest of places, moving them both into a new town and pack.

Liam becomes a refugee, running for his life in fear of his enemy showing up to finish the job. Now he and his mom must remake their lives at all costs and pray he can be safe from danger.

Little does he know, the surprise of his life is yet to come.

Warning: contains gay sexual activities and violence.

Spin off of "The Orphan's Mate". Can be read as a standalone (but I recommend reading this first to avoid any spoilers).

title: MONSTER ( JACOB BLACK )
description:
❝He walked into my heart like he always belonged there, took down my walls and lit my soul on fire.❞

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Isabella Swan's life is once again in danger when Victoria creates an army of newborns to continue her infernal quest for revenge. The Cullens and the wolves are forced to create an alliance in order to protect Bella. In the midst of it all, Jasper calls in the only person he knows who can help them stop the newborns. 

Dakota White is an abomination of nature. She is a hybrid, half shape-shifter and half vampire. By the age of fifteen, Dakota had been banished from her family's tribe and no coven of vampires would dare accept her. To the wolves she was just another blood-sucking leech and was too dog for the vampires. Shunned away, it left Dakota no choice but to live a life of solitude. She had become the epitome of a lone wolf. 

What will happen when Dakota's called in by Jasper for help? What will happen when this lone wolf meets Jacob Black? Will Jacob ever let his love for Bella go? Will Dakota finally find the acceptance that she has been seeking for?

title: Hunted {Dean Winchester 3}
description:
"We're falling apart and I hate it!" I yelled, tears welling up in my eyes. "I want to hate you! I want to hate you for selling your soul to save me! I want to hate you for not caring about your own life enough to try and save it! I want to hate you for all of this. But I can't! I won't!" 

"It would be easier if you did!" Dean yelled back. "So just hate me already! Hate me! Leave me! Whatever you have to do to get through this! Just do it!"

"Just...I don't want you to die." My voice faltered. "Please, Dean. Please. I just can't take this anymore." 

His eyes softened as he stepped forward and wrapped me in his arms. "I'm sorry, angel. I really am." 

"I can't deal with all of this on my own." 

"Yes, you can." Dean said. "You are so much stronger than you think. Believe me." 

___

Saige Dawson's world was crashing down around her now. Not only was she slowly learning more about the curse she carried within her, but she realized just how bad things could get if she fell into the wrong arms. She also was trying to cope with the fact that she had died. That Sam had died. That because of that, Dean had sold his soul to a demon and was damned to burn in hell for eternity if she couldn't save him within a year. 

Time was running out and she was scared. She also has to learn how to tap into the power within her. She wasn't sure whether the power was good or bad and that alone made her want to ignore it, but she couldn't. She had to dig deep. To save Dean. To save herself. To find out what she truly is.

title: Masked
description:
❧❧WINNER OF THE WATTYS 2016 for VORACIOUS READS ❧❧
  
An invisible enemy. A deadly virus. A human hacker and a Werewolf alpha are their only hope. That's if they don't kill each other first.

When Parker Johnson, a top security specialist, is called in to help track down the architects behind a genetically engineered virus, she doesn't hesitate. Even if it means working with Daniel Locke, the icy Alpha Commander who she had the misfortune of pissing off. Big time.

Fierce, powerful, and determined, Daniel has spent his whole life defending those he loves. But this time the enemy is invisible, and everywhere. An enemy that could destroy his entire race. The last thing he needs is a curvy, brunette firecracker who's been a thorn in his side for more than a decade. But the Alliance has other ideas. The disease is spreading, and Parker's technological abilities might be their only hope for survival. 

It is a race against the clock for this unlikely couple as they attempt to save those they love, while at the same time contend with a mutual attraction that refuses to be silenced.

title: Pulchritude
description:
Pulchritude is a thrilling Vampire Diaries fanfiction that introduces Maddy, a powerful 895-year-old banshee/vampire hybrid, as the protagonist. Maddy has lived through centuries, watching as her loved ones come and go while she remains unchanged.

When Maddy encounters the notorious Klaus Mikaelson, her world turns upside down. Klaus, the original hybrid, is known for his cunning and brutal ways, but Maddy sees a different side to him. Drawn to each other by an inexplicable force, Maddy and Klaus embark on a dangerous and forbidden romance.

As they navigate their way through the complexities of their relationship, Maddy and Klaus must also confront the looming threat of their enemies. With danger at every turn, Maddy and Klaus must use all their skills to protect each other and stay alive.

But as their love grows stronger, Maddy begins to realize that Klaus is not the monster everyone makes him out to be. Beneath his cold exterior lies a vulnerable and loving heart. Will Maddy be able to change Klaus for the better, or will their differences ultimately tear them apart?

title: Ghost ↬ Derek Hale
description:
"I'm searching for something that I can't reach."

↬

Lily Stilinski's biggest problems in life used to be easily defined: figuring out how to get her friends to be civil towards one another, not missing the delivery time for her next collectable and finding out how to convince people that - yes, she does have a collection of fantasy weapons - but no, she isn't a nerd. 

At least, those were her worries before her idiot brother decided that it would be a great idea to go searching the woods at night for a dead body.

Now she finds herself anxious about almost everything; not only have none of her old problems disappeared (her friends still hate each other, she hasn't even had time to order anything new and now, she's finding herself trying to convince her dad that - no, that's not blood on my special edition Batarang - when really it is and she has no idea how to get it out) but now she has new, even worse ones. Like deciding whether or not she can trust Derek Hale, trying to help her best friend not rage out and kill people and keeping herself and everyone else alive when all she wants to do is crawl under her bed and hide. 

With her friends and family in tow and a surprisingly useful hobby, Lily Stilinski thinks she just might make it out relatively okay - too bad she can't say the same for her collection.

↬

title: Alpha Zaelah |  Book One: Realities Demise
description:
The werewolves and the human kingdoms have been at a vicious war for 25 years and with these years came blindness as everyone forgot what they were fighting for and who they were fighting for. 

Zaelah, the queen of Aropia had heard many stories from her father about the beasts who could disguise themselves as her kind and kill without regret, which caused her mind to be made upon who they were and what they were capable of.

What happens when Zaelah discovers that she is the soulmate of Alpha Malik, the leader of the kind she was told to fear.

Will she resist the feeling or dive in headfirst?

title: Fated [Jikook ff] ✅
description:
I was woken up from my short nap when the sudden nauseous feeling hit me, and I lurched to the bathroom.

"This is harder than I thought," I mumbled to myself. 

My hand automatically caressed the bump on my stomach, and I smiled at the feel of it under my palm.

"It's okay, honey. I'll do everything to protect you," I whispered lovingly before looking at my reflection in the mirror.

I took a deep breath and mustered out the most energetic smile on my face as self-motivation to start another brand-new day.

SUMMARY: Jimin is a single parent, wanting no attachment to anyone and only want to love his child. But of course, Jungkook appears.

title: Restless Waves
description:
On a hunt gone wrong, Rowan is left with limited time to remove a supernatural bond before he falls in love with the one species he was raised to hate.

"He lives on land, permanently. How are we supposed to make this work?" Kaerius asked, watching the boy sitting on the sand dunes.
"You're not. We're not designed to fall in love with them. You're burdened by this," Laiken replied, sinking under the waves and swimming away, leaving Kaerius to stare at the human he had bonded with, and leaving him alone to make a life-changing decision.

title: Mama Hale
description:
//PSA BEFORE YOU READ: This story was written when I was brand new to everything writing. For a much better everything, go read the rewritten version on my profile. Still written by me, just MUCH better in literally every way. If you still choose to read this, then brace yourself for a bumpy ride.//

Lyrica Hale, wife of Derek Hale, teaches Music Ed. at a school called Beacon Hills High School. She's a werewolf, obviously. The day she was turned, a mark appeared on the base of her neck. A simple triskele with initials under it. She discovered that the initials are of her future family members. What happens when her students start turning into werewolves? How will her and her husband handle these betas running amok?


I officially suck at descriptions. This is basically a Derek Hale fanfiction. The story will follow the show. I just love the fluff about Derek's wife or girlfriend becoming the mother of his pack. SO I wrote my own. Enjoy!

title: My Brother is my Mate!!
description:
This is NOT a story about incest so please don't get the wrong idea. 

Disclaimer: I made this book when I was like 12 so just beware lol 

         "Blake how the heck are you my m-mate?" I say with the courage that I have left, which isn't very much.  "Kennedy I've waited for this moment since last year." "What do you mean?" I ask while looking down at the floor avoiding his eyes.

         "I mean that I have known that you were my mate since I shifted but I didn't tell you, and now you finally know", he states as he comes closer and closer until we are so close I can feel his breathe on my cheek. "U-um Blake what are you doing?", I say as he looks at my lips and I gaze at his blue-green eyes. "Something I have waited way too long to do", He says as his lips come crashing onto mine. 
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
          Kennedy is a 16 year old girl. Her birthday is in 2 weeks and it will be her turn to find her mate. Also she will finally shift into her wolf. But on her birthday she will find something out that will change her life completely, not only will she find her mate but she will find something about her that will change her future..... Read to find out :)

title: (Accurate) THE CEO'S OMEGA. Namjin.
description:
He could tell the Alpha was just as nervous as he was. He knew Namjoon didn't want to hurt him, but it was time, it was now and there was no turning back from it. So slowly he untied the robe he had on, the only cover he had on.

He looked through the mirror from where he stood  to the Alpha sitting on the edge of the bed as he sensually let the robe off the curves of his body to slowly pool at his feet, leaving him completely bear, to the alpha. 
"You still want to watch that movie?"


 
Finally getting to experience the world of love, the one he always wanted, the one his parents had, Seokjin couldn't help but wonder if it was enough, if he did it all wrong, and if maybe you get another chance at it. 

Warning

Violence

╰┈➤ ❝ 𝐒𝐀𝐋𝐕𝐀𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐄 𝐒𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐑

𝑰𝒏 𝒘𝒉𝒊𝒄𝒉, over a hundred years after the deaths of the Salvatore siblings, Skyler Salvatore - better known as Skyler Mikaelson - returns to Mystic Falls to gain the trust of her brothers and their friends in order to help break the curse put on her best friend and brother in law, Klaus Mikaelson. 
However, as time goes on it becomes harder for Skyler to betray her brothers. In the end, she must choose between her brothers and her husband and soulmate - Kol Mikaelson. Who will she choose?

title: Fragile Boy In The Supernatural Family ♡
description:
After his mother was missing for like two months. 16 years old Aditya Moved to his father's house who his mother told as dead before sixteen years. To more surprise, he had three overprotective Brothers. They all are not normal humans . unlike him , All are special including his twin brother.


Will his family accept; when he choose to mate with a werewolf, Most Powerfull creature in their mysterious world, their number one Rebel?





Scene-01

"Hello. Little one . How are you feeling now?

he said  shyly - sorry, but who are you all? I can't remember! sorry!"





Scene-02


He is sighing sadly, "I know that but just think about the consequences if gets to know the truth himself. He will be very shocked.  He is not a normal healthy person. He is a fragile and depressed."





The older with a tension filled voice, " I know that my boy. That's why I'm scared to expose our true identity. If he was the same kid who was eight year, then there would be no trouble but now he is living a normal human's life. He will definitely be shocked and uncontrollable. He can't accept our world and our reality"




The unspoken reality, happening behind the human world.



Scene - 03,


"Will you accept me, little bub ?" The werewolf asked with the softest voice they ever used.



He looked at the giant wolf in front of his fragile human form.

Will he choose his family or the Love of his life?

I categorized the reading list.

The ongoing list: in the profile will have regular updates.

Hold: will have a chapter if at least a person gives me a DM for their favourite things they expected to see as an episode, Do not detail just specific things to add that will come as an episode within(the request should not break the flow the story),

A week one person can request one thing. So regular people who commented on that particular story in past will get priority as I don't want you all to be disappointed.

Love you all .

title: What It Means To Be Me
description:
I was supposed to die when I was five but when my parents gave me the 
chance to run, I took it. I didn't understand much at the time except 
that I needed to get as far away from my old pack as possible, so I did.
 

After living in the wild on his own for twelve years, surviving on 
whatever he could manage to catch or scavenge, Tanner finds himself in a
 situation with a new pack of werewolves...one that he can't run away 
from this time. 

Cole is a professor at the local university and alpha of the Moon 
pack. He takes his position very seriously, so when a possible rouge 
wolf is found to be taking pets from the neighborhood, he has to act 
fast to stop it and keep his own pack's wolves safe from possible human 
hunting. When he tracks down the animal he expects it to be a sick or 
injured wolf that couldn't hunt for itself. What he didn't expect to 
find was an abandoned werewolf who needed him desperately...even if it 
didn't seem to think so.

title: Breaking the Silence
description:
⚠️ ORIGINALLY TITLED SILENT LUNA ⚠️ 

After a terrible car accident when she was seven, Eirenae's life got turned upside down. Her father changed everything, becoming rotten and abusive to the point it caused her to stop speaking entirely. Eleven years later and she still lives by his rules, trapped under his thumb. She has nowhere to go; no life outside the awful one she's forced into at home, and any time she tries to speak, her voice fails her. Without much hope left, she suffers in silence. Until moving to a new town changes everything. 

Arriving at her new school, Eirenae immediately catches the attention of six students. They're the nicest anyone has ever been to her, but everything about them strikes her funny: they're naturally perfect, have insane athletic reflexes, and they keep using strange words like "Alpha", "Luna", and "pack". On top of it all, their eyes horrifyingly seem to change color and no matter how much she runs or gives hints she should be left alone, they won't stop being overly friendly. 

No one seems to be willing to explain anything to her, so maybe it's time to bring her life back into her own hands, discover what has been hiding from her past, and let herself be rescued. . . and maybe not particularly in that order!



~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

title: DEVILS SMILE, SIREN EYES; Klaus Mikaelson
description:
She licks blood off her fingers / And she looks like divine absolution / Careful, meleager, this is your sport / But she's not playing a game. 

Do not think / You are safe because / You love her / Do not think / She will not stain her mouth red / With your blood too.

~ atalanta | m.c  (via bronyrpblog)


'Seriously?'
'Take a little risk, love,' he gave her the devils smile, one that she found irresistible. 
'What do I have to lose?' Mira grinned as she took the cloth out of his hands. 
'Other than your life? Not much.'
'Okay, one,' she said as she tied the cloth around her eyes. 'That's not a great way to help me get over the whole serial killer thing. Two, ouch.'
He just grinned, and she took his hand, blindly. 


_______________



Klaus glanced at the voice, at Miranda Baudelaire, blinking at how short she was. She was beautiful, he had to admit. Something he was sure to paint later on. 
She had white hair that was held in a messy bun by a pencil, and deep sea blue eyes that seemed to call to him, as if she was a siren beckoning him towards her, just for him to drown.

title: Mate Or Not. You're Still A Jerk (#1 Mate or Not)
description:
Lux loved her new life with her pack, the pack she'd joined two years ago after meeting her pen pal --the alpha--who was always the person to treat her best. 

So imagine her surprise when she has to go back with her pack to the place she ran from, the people she ran from. Her old pack...The pack that hated her and gave her nothing but hell

But Lux had changed in those two years; long gone was the chubby blond that never talked back and was replaced by a badass third command that doesn't take shit from anyone and is in charge of training her wolves.

But will Lux's new personality be enough to keep her from getting hurt? Especially when she has to see the person who made her leave, Damon, her mate, the one who rejected her and the alpha of her old pack...

title: The Blood Red Path
description:
How do you fight the Moon?

The King has fallen to a God. 

The world is gathering, surrounding the Northern hemisphere on all side, crushing, strangling the land in a tight noose.

All they demand is Charlie's head.  The female Alpha born from two alphas. The first of her kind. Charlie's mother Victoria was the first female Alpha, who has created the way, has walked the path first for her daughter to follow with ease behind her. Through teeth and claw the Northern Hemisphere was a sanctuary for Charlie to be raised on. Now, it's become the center for the Moon's army to face the sharpened weapons of Charlie's army. 

The great spread of old has returned to the meeting place where the final battle will occur. 

Trades will be made, sides picked, and the blood-red path will be walked until only the One remains. 

There can only be One. The Moon intends to keep her position while Charlie fights the fight for the Wilds, who have been severed from their souls at death. Punished to wander the world as ghosts without their halves. 

She fights the true fight for the Wilds, who can't fight for themselves. 

Charlie needs to understand who she has come from and who she can become. Charlie needs to understand how to bleed and how to bleed well.  She needs to become a God-eater. 

Welcome to the second half of Odin's Prize.

The Mikaelson's were in the midst of a battle with Tristan De Martel, when an old friend, Christopher arrives at their door, pleading for their help. There was a very powerful girl, her blood had the capacity to kill an entire species, Christopher had looked after her for her teenage years and within the blink of an eye, she had gone. 

Now the Mikaelson's need to help find the girl before someone else does and uses her blood for evil.

title: 𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐄 𝐋𝐎𝐕𝐄
description:
𝐄𝐌𝐁𝐑𝐘 𝐂𝐀𝐋𝐋 𝐱 𝐎𝐂


That's all they ever thought she'd be good for. A good imprint. Quiet... caring... nurturing... she'd never be strong like her brother. She'd never be enough to meet the standards they set for a true, worthy warrior. So when the tragedy struck, and the one person she knew she had on her side left her... she became everything they never thought she could be. She became powerful. She became strong and fierce. 

She became a warrior. 

Johara Black understood the sorrows of being underestimated and neglected better than anyone. Besides her mother, everyone believed her to be weak and powerless. After her mother's death, Johara's bitterness and resentment towards those people festered. She was tired of being cast aside by her brother and his friends. She was tired of being neglected by her father. She was tired of being ignored by everyone.

When she befriends a nice old lady that takes Johara under her wing and trains her to become something more powerful than anyone could imagine, she finds herself being offered the chance to prove them all wrong... 

Who was she to say no?

title: Still ▸ Teen Wolf [Book Two]
description:
[SAGE sequel]

"Destruction can only happen if those being destroyed have never felt pain." 

Sage Connelly always seemed to bring along a plague of dark hearts. Her junior year, however, seems to be the epitome of darkness as she is succumbed into such immense chaos. Not only have old flames come back to haunt her, but new fears are paralyzing her at night when a dark druid starts roaming around town, sacrificing people for the hell of it; while Scott's pack find themselves in the face of danger once again, Sage's name finds its way in the playing field of who could possibly be behind all of the atrocities. The blonde is forced to make decisions that no seventeen year old should have to make, and she is faced with the fall of two people that managed to find their way into her collapsing heart.  To make matters worse, the on-going relationship between herself and Stiles is now hitting the rocks the closer they come to revealing things about Sage she never even knew; Stiles refuses to love a hard exterior of a lifeless soul.

Sage Connelly's story must continue, and she must find things out about herself that have been hidden beyond the flames of the Hale fire. The notorious blonde must figure out how in the hell she is going to survive high school when her sanity is on a thin line of destruction and death. Sage Connelly must figure out how she is going to continue being Sage Connelly before the plague of dark hearts catches up to her.

[Season 3A and 3B]

title: just like me || remus lupin
description:
𝕎𝕙𝕪 𝕔𝕒𝕟'𝕥 𝕪𝕠𝕦 𝕓𝕖 𝕙𝕠𝕟𝕖𝕤𝕥 𝕨𝕚𝕥𝕙 𝕞𝕖? 

𝕎𝕠𝕦𝕝𝕕 𝕪𝕠𝕦 𝕤𝕥𝕒𝕪 𝕚𝕗 𝕀 𝕨𝕒𝕤?

:)))))

As he stares from afar he sees it on her arm. Scars. Similar to the ones he has. Cerise pulls her sleeve down quickly and slaps her friend's hand away. 

The boy who's always had to fight his inner demons has always admired a certain girl from afar. She always challenged his curiosity in every way, shape, and form, intriguing him more. Unknown to his ickle mind, she was dealing with demons of her own. Demons that would continue to grow over time. Lupin's always felt something different for Cerise but maybe something else was connecting them other than feelings. He pondered, "Could she be just like me?"

:)))))

title: Alpha Grayson|✔️
description:
|HAS BEEN REWRITTEN| 

She was kind.
He was heartless.
She saw the good in everyone despite her past. 
He saw nothing but hatred for others because of his past. 
He was the Alpha.
She was a Betas daughter.
He wanted to save her
But he drowned from his own secrets. 
He brought out the worst in her.
She brought out the good in him.

She realised the rage filled murderous Alpha had a heart beneath it all but was it too late?

Two souls from two completely different worlds clash together and realise that they're not so different from each other after all. 

Alana Reid, a Betas daughter, only wants to be protected from her horrendous past by her mate but can he move on from what happened to her? 

Alpha Grayson, a man who's had a childhood no one would ever wish for, believes that his mate is best off without him but he can't live without her. Is she willing to accept his past and move on? 

*********

I thought about all the obstacles I had to overcome to get to where I am today as I walked towards my sons crib. Everything I went through was worth it. "Don't worry, mommy's coming," I said in a baby voice hoping to comfort him even though he wasn't crying. My heart dropped in my chest when I saw it was empty. No baby in sight. "Gray!," I screamed loudly like I was getting stabbed over and over again. He ran into the nursery, scanning the area for any danger. "He's gone! Our baby's gone!" His eyebrows furrowed as his eyes softened realising what happened. Just as quick as it came, it vanished and he was back with the icy look in his eye. The one he had when we first met. For a moment, I was afraid of him going back to his old self before dismissing that thought and focusing on my missing newborn son.
Don't worry, I'm coming for you, my little bubba...

Will the angel given to him melt the Alphas ice solid façade or not? Is she helping him escape his darkness or is she dragging him into hers? Read to find out...

Cover by @belladz07

title: Fates Intertwined
description:
Ranked #1 in Werewolf Genre on December 2017
  
  16-year-old Celestine Lucas was a happy-go-lucky girl. She had a perfect family and a perfect life. And almost had her 'Happily ever after', till a horrific accident snatches her life away from her... leaving her behind with terrible nightmares and constant panic attacks... 
  
  Now 4 years later, at the age of 20, still she is struggling with her inner ghosts...
  
  Demetrius Williams doesn't have a perfect life... no... he had it very bad.
  
   His mate ran away, leaving him with a six months old treasure and a heartbroken wolf. Now his lonely wolf needs support to survive and his pack needs a Luna... Above all his little girl needs a mother...
  
  Two people with broken hearts and trust... And a little angel holding them together... Will they be able to trust each other, forget and forgive their differences, and fall in love...
  
  And what happens when fate decides to test them again??

authorBio:
Hi there...
I am AnnaBella, well officially I am Niranjana but being a huge fan of fairytales esp 'Belle and the Beast' I would like to be known as AnnaBella in this wattyworld.

Reading is a hobby I am having since I was around 8 or 9 years old,  I love reading fantasies, werewolves, vampires etc. The first novel I remember reading is Dracula by Bram Stoker, not in English but a translation in my native language, the images imprinted on my little mind that day still gives me shudders but I love the book nevertheless.I am an emotional person who gets deeply connected to the books I read, I laugh with the character and cry with the character even get angry at times, people might think am a little crazy but  I believe all the book lovers out there can connect with me on this.

Books that touched my heart and earned a few teardrops :
1. 'Pride And Prejudice' by Jane Austin
2. 'Precious Bones' by Irina Shapiro
3. 'Dream Lover' by  Kimberley Reeves.

Writing short stories and small poems have always been there all that time, only after joining wattpad I decided to try my luck with novels  Currently I have three books ongoing in wattpad a werewolf book, a fantasy book, a short story, and a romance novel...

****Books****
1. FatesIntertwined - #1  Werewolf - December 2017
2. Azrael's Angel - #21 Fantasy December 2017
3. Love You Forever & Always

title: The Fox and The Wolf
description:
For 18 year old Avery Williams, life hasn't been an easy ride. With her mom on life support, being poor which means she can't afford her mom's surgery, she has to raise her 6 year old sister Lilly by herself in their small apartment, and her dad abandoned them before Lilly was even born.  But one stormy night while Avery was driving home in their old ford pickup truck, her and Lilly come across an injured fox lying in the middle of the road. She decides to pull of and help the poor fox. But after she helps it, it starts to talk. The next thing Avery knows, is that the fox is glowing and the little glow goes inside her body.  With her new secret, she can shift into a fox. But the fox named, Red, told her she can't tell anyone. So now it's Avery's and Lilly's little secret.
 ---------------------------------------
Jake Taylor is the alpha of the Southern Nightshade Pack. He's used to getting what he wants. When he comes across Avery and Lilly walking in a park, he finds out that she is his mate. And he wants her. Bad. So he does the only thing he can think of. Have him and his friends kidnap her.  But will he put up with her trying to escape? Will he find out her little secret? Read the book and find out.
