title: THE TEKULA PROJECT
description:
(COMPLETED | UNDER EDITING) Fresh out of college, Veronica Odair is hired as a forensic scientist at the infamous B.E.A.R. Laboratories. She is put to work on the classified Tekula Project, but certain events lead her to question her job. What is so dangerous about Level 5? Why do her tests come back increasingly strange? What secrets are B.E.A.R. Laboratories hiding? Veronica plans to find out.

▪▪▪

Brown eyes, nearly obscured by rich locks of dark hair, stare into my light green ones with an intensity which nearly causes my knees to wobble. I can hear nothing but the thudding of my heart beating wildly in my chest, the sounds of the sirens turning into white noise at the back of my mind.

I back up until my spine connects with the elevator doors. I shiver as my bare arms come in contact with the cool metal. "Someone help me, please," I beg.

The man stalks closer still. His eyes are fixed solely on me, unmoving, intense. His fists are clutched tightly against his sides, as though restraining himself in some way. Restraining himself from what, I don't want to know.

The man stops only an arm's length away from me. I stare up at him with wide eyes, my lips parted in fear. I stand frozen, unable to move. I shut my eyes, turning my head away.

Laboured breathing, the touch of fingertips on my bare shoulder, breath on my lips. A heavy, deep inhale. Slow exhale. A forehead against mine, shaky hands cupping the back of my neck, fingertips sliding into my red locks.

My eyes open to meet the warmest pair of honey eyes.

Cover by AnnaCharles16

description:
Kim Taehyung is the last Male Omega to ever exist in the whole world, he lives with his Sub-Alpha and Dom-Alpha siblings Kim Seokjin and Kim Kahashi. Taehyung has a cold and emotionless attitude towards others, and sometimes even towards his siblings and best friend, Park Jimin. They live in a pack called the Crystal Moon Pack, which was a hidden and well-protected pack to keep any intruder from coming in and coming out. The three brothers' mother was a Female Omega, while their father was a Great Alpha, making the two brothers Alphas, but Taehyung as a special Male Omega where there is a great destiny that awaits him that the Moon Goddess herself has given. Taehyung knows that when he turns 18, he will find his destined partner that will be by his side forever but he doesn't want one, why? The reason was unknown.

But what happens when he meets his destined partner Jeon Jungkook, the next Alpha of his pack the Golden Stone Pack? Will he still choose not to have a mate? Or will Jungkook find a way for him to be by Taehyung's side.

title: Captured By A Ruthless Vampire King (Book 2) ✔️
description:
Book 2 of (The Awakening Series)

I'm a She-wolf who happened to be born on the day of The Awakening. My people once believed that the day when Luna passes directly behind earth and into the shadows was the day of new beginnings. The day of rebirth! They once called those particular days.... Luna passing days! 

For centuries Werewolves believed that in the year 2081 on the Luna passing day. Our creator and savior the moon Goddess would once again walk the earth. Even the Lycans who are believed to be direct descendants of the moon goddess believed in Luna passing days. 

All of my people were wrong, Lycans included. The Luna passing day in the year 2081 was marked as The Awakening. For humans, it was the act of the vampire species coming into awareness of the human world. 

To Werewolves, it was the day we have knocked off our high horses. Well, that's how I see it anyway but I'm no ordinary She-wolf. My kind usually thrives just thinking about spilling vampire blood. They always have.  

I honestly feel like we all can get along. Seriously, holding on to grudges never did anyone any good. It's pointless. We should all co-exist. 

I truly thought I understood the pain of losing your loved ones. I knew it cut deep but I never truly understand how fucking deep it hurts. 

You see I use to believe that most vampires were just misunderstood.

 I use to believe that the only way to stop the bloodshed is to forgive and forget. 

How fortunate for me, that funny word name fate decided to show me otherwise. The Vampires took someone extremely important away from me. They crushed my soul when they took her life. I'll never forgive them. For the first time in history, my people were right

I'll never heal.  Especially, now! I'm living with this ruthless Vampire King who insists on calling me his chosen but the sickest part of it all is he is actually my mate.

#1 in Vampire/Romance 
# 2 in series 


Unedited.
Cover Created By:@Autumnsewell

After the events of her sister's death, Willow Argent felt broken. And even though her father and her best friend moved to France, Willow stayed in Beacon Hills, living with her sister best friend. She remembered watching her sister fall in love twice and always thought she can't for that to happen to her, but the second her sister died that feeling died along with her. 

That was until she met a Beta with anger issues and a Chimera who hid behind a mask of lies. Will she finally feel the love her sister felt? Or will she just get hurt in the end?

title: The Lost Child - Derek Hale x Reader // Teen Wolf x Marvel AU [Shadow Wolf 1]
description:
Teen Wolf x Marvel AU

Summary: Y/N Stark was taken from her family when she was three years old. It's fifteen years later and her family believes she is dead. Then how is she living in Beacon Hills?

Warnings: Language, Mentions of Torture/Death/Blood/Injuries/Being Held Captive, Medical Inaccuracies, Bad Parenting, Talks of Fertility Issues, Mentions of Grief and Bad Coping Mechanisms, Brainwashing, Mentions of Trauma, Possible Grammar Mistakes

Pairings: Derek Hale x Reader, Steve Rogers x Bucky Barnes, Bruce Banner x Natasha Romanoff, Vision x Wanda Maximoff, & More To Come!

Previous Pairings: Tony Stark x Pepper Potts, Scott McCall x Allison Argent

Note: Y/N was adopted by Tony Stark and Pepper Potts as a baby. I did this so more people could see themselves in this story.

Additional Note: While this is a Teen Wolf x Marvel AU, not everything is true to the shows/movies/comics. I had to change things for the story. This does loosely follow Teen Wolf Season 4.

title: The kitten claims her mate (complete)
description:
A curious and mischievous kitten explores in the night and finds a warm werewolf to curl up next to.

Betty has been having dreams that make no sense. They are filled with abstract shiny objects and warm delicious smells. Plus she can't explain the odd things happening in her room. If she didn't know better, she'd think a kitten was ransacking her room at night! 

She's always kept to herself and was happy with her life. Now a stranger is growling at her door, demanding answers that she can't provide. Why is she drawn to this angry, growling man?

authorBio:
"A sheltered life can be a daring life as well. For all serious daring starts from within." - Eudora Welty, One Writer's Beginnings

Love that quote! We live daring lives through the books we read and the books we create.

I love honest feedback but please don't be a dream crusher. I can be slightly obsessive so my chapters will probably get edited quite a bit.

I love the beach, surfing, hiking, reading, anime, geeky shows and love my family. I'm currently working f/t, going to college, raising my family and writing... So if it takes a while to update I'm sorry AND if a chapter just makes no sense it's probably been done on too little sleep and not enough caffeine lol just let me know it's a little crazy and I'll fix it

My favorite books right now: the academy series by C.L.Stone,  anything by Ilona Andrews, Scarlett Dawn, the Martian and many many more.

I'm new to wattpad so bare with me xD

Also, if you just insanely love my writing: check out Laughing Fate sold on kindle. It was written like ten years ago and my writing style has changed slightly but I still love it

title: Ivan's Queen
description:
Book 4 of The Alpha Series! Cannot be read as a standalone book! Highest rank: #1 in Werewolf genre on 06/11/2019!

Amelia Reid and Ivan Romanov were once childhood friends that would see each other every summer. But that all changes when Ivan stops visiting. A few years later, they meet again. But this time, they don't see each other as friends. 

Join Amelia's journey as she tries to peel back the many layers of Ivan Romanov while finding her place in a completely different world. 

***

"They show what you've been through, and I think that's beautiful." I whisper back, running my fingers through his hair. "Hell, you're ten times stronger than I could ever be." 

In an instant, he turns around to lay on his back with me straddling his waist. I blush at the position, his hand caressing my heated cheek adoringly. His emerald gems hold an array of emotions, flickering across too quickly for me to catch and decipher. So, I choose to admire him instead. 

I meant what I said. Ivan is so breathtakingly handsome that it hurts sometimes. His midnight black hair is always tousled sexily, eyes bright and alert, there's two freckles by his right brow and one by his chin. His lips are full and most of the time they're either in a frown or a straight line, but I manage to catch several small smiles throughout the day. He's quite muscular but whenever he holds me I feel safe and protected, as if I'm in a soft cocoon. 

"You don't need to be strong." His low murmur snaps me out of my trance. "You have me, I'll always protect you." 

"You protect me from the world and I'll protect you from yourself, deal?" I smile softly when he laughs, nodding in agreement.

title: Queen of Kings
description:
Blood. Blood everywhere.

It was all I could see as bodies laid everywhere. The stench of rotten flesh and blood filtered through my nose, making me cringe. It wasn't just werewolves, but many other beings.

That wasn't the worst part.

The worst part was that this was all because of me. Because of who I am.

Why did it have to be me?

~

Growing up in the Lunar Shadow Pack, Liana Mason finally discovers who she truly is.

What happens when she discovers how much power she really has and who is really after her?

title: Things that Go Bump in the Night
description:
It's been six years since werewolves revealed themselves to the world, five since they took over every aspect of the government and asserted their dominance over humans, and four since Juniper's dad was murdered by a werewolf coming home from work. Forced to drop out of college to go into the human workforce and be the "guardian" of her younger half-sister, Juniper Olden has no illusions about werewolves. They are monsters, monsters that can burn in hell for all she cares. But when she comes face to face with what she hates the most she must make a choice. Which fate does she fear more, death or that of a werewolf's mate?

authorBio:
I like to write. I like to read. So obviously I have become quite addicted to Wattpad.

I don't know why I love writing so much, but it seems that my mind is an endless movie theater and any time I have a pencil in my hand and a piece of paper in front of me I am writing down a plot line. I want my stories to be original, thought provoking, interesting and most of all give you a laugh every once in a while.

Because what is fun about reading a story without some form of comic relief?

title: 𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐁𝐈𝐃𝐃𝐄𝐍 𝐋𝐎𝐕𝐄 ➢ ᴀʟʟɪꜱᴏɴ ᴀʀɢᴇɴᴛ / ʟʏᴅɪᴀ ᴍᴀʀᴛɪɴ ⁽ᴳˣᴳ⁾
description:
** COMPLETED **
It's been years since the fire that killed most of her family, but Amara Hale has been able to move on as much as she can. But it seems like the past always has to come back at some point. Some times the past can come back slowly... but other times the past comes back like a slap in the face. 

When Amara's best friends, Scott McCall and Stiles Stilinski, decide to go out to the woods at night, looking for a dead body, Scott gets bit. That's when the past starts to come back. With Amara's cousins coming back to town, one of them dying, a family enemy moving to town as well, watching family become killers...

 Life gets a bit more crazy. 

But maybe the past coming back can cause new things. Like a forbidden love.

title: Running out of Time (#Wattys2017)
description:
When your mate rejects you, five years is all you have to find your second chance or you die.

When Lilly is rejected on her 17th birthday she makes the decision to go and live a life instead of wasting time looking for the second chance she may never find. Over the next 4.75 years she travels the world. Her plan was to go home a month before she died so she could spend it with her family. Fate has other plans though. Three months before she is supposed to die her mother dies forcing her to go home early. 

It isn't long though before she meets Alpha Clarke Hunt. He just so happens to be the Alpha of the pack her ex-mate is the Beta to. It doesn't take long for the young Alpha to become enchanted by the young woman starring death right in the face. As Lilly tries to ignore him so she doesn't cause more heartbreak when she dies, another obstacle finds its way into her path.

Her ex-mate.

In her last few months Lilly might just let one of them win her heart, only to break it right away.

Nothing wrong ever happens here.

title: The Alpha and The Enforcer [TATE] (STILL EDITING)
description:
Two shattered hearts. One fractured pack. A battle for love and survival.

He was the Alpha born to lead, but when his mate perished in a fire, the flames consumed more than her life-they devoured his sanity. Lost and unfit to rule, he disappeared to Echo House, a place of solitude and healing. Now, three years later, he returns as a leader reborn, ready to guide his pack through any storm.  

She was a warrior forged in heartbreak. Rejected by her mate, she built walls no one could scale, burying her pain beneath endless training and the unyielding demands of her duty. Her strength became her armor, her coldness a shield.  

For years, they lived in the same pack but on opposite paths, their pain too raw and their silence too heavy to breach. But fate is never silent for long. When they finally cross paths, their collision is electric-raw emotions ignite, long-buried wounds reopen, and a connection they never expected threatens to unravel everything.  

But the pack stands on the brink of war, its enemies closing in with every shadow. As tensions rise and loyalty is tested, they must decide:  

Will they let the pain of their pasts destroy them? Or will they rise together to face the fight of their lives?

The Alpha who rebuilt himself. The warrior who lost her way. Together, they may save their pack-or doom it forever.  

When love and leadership collide, the stakes are life or death.

---

A Note from the Author:
Welcome to my debut novel-a tale of love, loss, and the courage to start again. This story has been a journey of passion, persistence, and endless revision. It's not perfect, but it's written from the heart, and I hope it resonates with yours.  

If you're here to experience heartbreak, hope, and the thrill of two wolves fighting not only for their pack but for themselves, you're in the right place. Thank you for joining me on this journey. Let's see where it takes us!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi Everyone!

I'm Izzy. I just turned 19 years old last month. I'm a first-year freshman in college and I love reading books. I can honestly get lost in a good book to the point where I am talking to the characters and forgetting where I am physically. So my friends have looked at me weirdly when out of nowhere I yell, "This character is getting me tight," lol. It's honestly something lol.

I have currently published a book on Wattpad called "The Alpha and The Enforcer." This has been a book I have written a 3rd time due to me forgetting my account information so many times lol. I was ... 13 years old when I started writing the book I think but regardless it is my first book and I hope you guys give it a chance.

I write in my free time which has become less and less since my second semester in college. I am not only a full-time student but I am also working and playing a sport as a hobby (for now), just to keep myself active and fit for the time being. I love writing music as well as books.  I have a song in the works right now and I'm still thinking about whether or not I should post it when I'm done.

I'm not much of a shy person but I can be once I step out of my comfort zone. So, this is all new to me and I'm hoping to get used to it sooner rather than later.

Anyways! That's it about me! I know, pretty boring. Sorry, I'm not much of a fun person sadly lol. Thank you to those who took the time to read this and whoever took the time to read my book as well. I know it is not the best and I am still in the editing stage but thank you regardless.

Stay Blessed

~xoxo
Izzy

title: Opal
description:
"Did you miss me?"

He glares, an expression so fierce I shrink away.

"I missed you as much as I would miss a lung, I could hardly even breathe without you." 


 ☾❂ ☾❂ ☾❂ ☾❂ ☾❂ ☾❂ ☾❂ ☾❂ ☾❂ ☾❂ ☾❂ ☾ 


Opal has been through a lot in her life, many things that left her feeling broken and shattered. The only thing that kept her together was her best friend, Keifer. 

She knew deep down that Keifer was her mate, and that he would always be there for her, that is until he's taken away.


Ever since Keifer was adopted, he knew that he was different from the other lycans. He didn't know how to channel his anger or his pent up frustration, so he did what any teenager does. He rebelled. 

But, Keifer took his shenanigans too far when he almost killed the person he loves most. He's sent away to a military camp for the troubled, separated from his family and mate for years as he learns to control himself.


Keifer's resentment grows.


Opal's strength dwindles.


Both of them are tested when Opal takes things to the extreme and decides to run away, on the hunt to find her mate and mend her heart, no matter what the cost.

authorBio:
Hello! I am glad you are thinking of reading one of my stories... or not! Trust me I will not get angry if you don't read it. The purpose of my fanfic writing is selfish. I have serious OCPD and when I watch a movie and it doesnt end happy I write fan fictions. This notice is for my sanity. So here it is
I am not sexist. It is impossible for me to be one since I can't be sexist against women since I am one. I cannot be sexist against men since three of my  friends are guys and I am sexually attracted to guys. If a comment in my stories makes you think I'm sexist, this will save the time having to explain to you that I am not sexist. Capiche?
I am not racist. For those of you who think I am racist, I am not. I love people of all colors. It wasn't until I was 15 that I learnt that Racism was a thing because I had been raised in a family who respected people of all races and I didn't think twice about making friends with someone of a different race because the only difference I saw was that we are not the same person. Same with every other human
I am not trying to preach. I am religious but I am not going to throw it in your face. I am not going to write things that make me uncomfortable. The moment I tell people I am religious they instantly think I am going to wave a cross in their face and tell them to repent. Hate to break it to you but the people who are like that are Karens and only 5% of the world. I am not comfortable cussing though I may use a word or two in my stories because I can't think of another word for "butt" and I may make a character gay. I may not be gay and I may be the person who wants to save my virginity till marriage but I'll love you all the same regardless. And if you are going to accuse me of being against the gay community, I am a full blown huge Stan of Ziam and Taekook. my favorite show right now is Young Royals, and I am pissed that there aren't more Ziam/Taekook fanfics.
So there you go! Enjoy!

title: Alpha Charming | Rheon
description:
When Ash learns she is a royal werewolf's mate and the key to breaking his curse, paying her studio rent becomes the least of her problems.  

*****

When the opportunity of a lifetime presented itself, Ashlyn was quick to catch the first flight to Scotland to photograph the wedding of a prestigious family of Dukes and Duchesses. What she didn't expect was to meet a handsome duke with a dark secret who couldn't seem to keep his eyes off her. 

Little did she know that her handsome duke is cursed and she is the key to breaking the evil spell that binds him to a witch. 

Ashlyn's world turns upside-down as she embarks on a life-altering journey where werewolves exist, where dark curses are real, and where she's the mate of a respected alpha - all while being awfully human. 

Beauty and the Beast takes a royal, howling twist in this epic rom-com novel.

authorBio:
Hi everyone!

Welcome to my Wattpad profile!

I am Lisa, and I've been writing since I was 13 years old. At the beginning, I only wrote fanfiction, but in 2021, a writing contest inspired me to write my first original book - which ended up winning 2nd place.

Now, for some personal info...

I am a Slytherin, but I like to think I am the good kind.

Coffee. That's it. I'm addicted to the strong essence of caffeinated bean water.

My idea of a perfect day would be to cuddle up in bed with a steaming mug of coffee, some chocolate, and watch the rain pitter-patter against my window while I write/watch TV/read/play Sims.

And last but not least, when I'm not writing, I enjoy painting, cooking, chilling with the fam, and playing Fortnite with the inner circle (my small group of 3 friends lol).

That's me!

title: Imprinted [Sterek]
description:
Stiles never fit in with all of the other kids. He was, well he wasn't that different, he was just like them. People did call him Wolf Boy though... It seemed that everyone in Beacon Hill knew about his paw-shaped birthmark that rested on his back placed directly in the center of his left shoulder blade. It was just a birthmark, he never understood what the big deal about it was. Could it have been his love and interest in wolves that also pushed them to call him that name? Stiles was never too sure.

One midwinter night in his family's cabin in the woods changed Stiles' life when an injured wolf found its way onto the porch of the cabin. There was no going back. Though he had already been stuck from the day he was born.

A/N Just want to let everyone know now, everyone is alive in this story. Hale's, Stile's mom, everyone.

title: My Broken, Mute Mate (SAMPLE) (PUBLISHED!!)
description:
Highest Rank: #3 in werewolf

THE LAST 15 CHAPTERS WILL BE TAKEN DOWN FEB. 1, 2019 DUE TO THIS BOOK BEING PUBLISHED IN MARCH.  

He looks over everyone, inhaling deeply, trying to pick out a scent. "She's here," he whispered with a smile. He walked through the sea of girls, to the back row where all of the lower class wolves stood, me among them.

He slowly passed each girl, sniffing them, everyone of them frowning as he passed, some even let tears escape. He was five girls away from me. A little part of me hopes that I'm his, but most of me is praying to the Moon Goddess that I'm not.

He stops at Sky, the girl next to me. She smiles and her eyes light up, but then he turns to me, making her cry. "Mine," he growls.

****
Ariel Carter's  life was torture. She was the slave of her pack ever since her parents died. And ever since their death, she hasn't said a word.

One day, the strongest Alpha in the world, Alpha Shane Chase comes to visit in search of his mate. 

When Ariel finds out that she's the Alpha's mate, she's terrified. She's already broken and alone and abused by her pack. She doesn't need a mate, let alone an Alpha to do that to her too.

Can Shane fix her after he finds out about her horrifying past, or will she stay broken forever?

Follow them on their  journey involving secrets, lies,   heartbreaks, and a twist that'll keep you at the edge of your seat until the very end.

title: 𝙏𝙃𝙀 𝙊𝙏𝙃𝙀𝙍 𝘼𝙍𝙂𝙀𝙉𝙏  // 𝙎𝙩𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙨 𝙨𝙩𝙞𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙨𝙠𝙞
description:
🎵 𝙨𝙤 𝙞𝙢 𝙜𝙤𝙣𝙣𝙖 𝙜𝙞𝙫𝙚 𝙖𝙡𝙡 𝙢𝙮 𝙨𝙚𝙘𝙧𝙚𝙩𝙨 𝙖𝙬𝙖𝙮🎵




Alexander argent, the twin sister to Allison argent

As far as normal could be, Alex's life was pretty much that.She went to school, came home ,done homework.

There was one thing in Alex's life that wasn't normal. She could heal any wound with just the touch of her hand, and all she had to do was close her eyes and feel that pain for 15 seconds.

At the age of 16, just after discovering her abilities her family makes a move to a certain supernatural town that goes by the name.. beacon hills.

Everything that once made sense in her life began to unravel. Her parent weren't who they said they were and her family might just become the enemy.

Everything In her life had been thrown up in the air. she felt alone with her secret until... she met her brown haired boy. Little did she know a run through the woods would take her into a world she couldn't image but was forced to, but she didn't do it alone. She had her friends.... her pack 


Read as Alex lives with her secrets
Read as she and her friends figure out the world one supernatural creature at a time. 
Read as she helps the world without people even realizing it.


•𝗗𝗜𝗦𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗥•

title: Distractions
description:
Cover by the brilliantly talented @amxnaah

"This is chaos. And not the good kind of chaos. The 'let me go die in a hole' kind of chaos." 

"Oh calm down. It's not that bad. The boys aren't even here to stab anything."

Clary Fairchild wasn't the only daughter of Jocelyn Fairchild and Valentine Morgenstern-just the only known one. She has a twin sister named Everest who's not exactly your average person. She hates sitting in chairs and stools for reasons unknown to her family, she's got purple hair, she's chaotic neutral-chaotic good at best-and she's had ties to the Shadow World since she was 4 years old. Unknowingly of course. But they were there. Seelie friends, vampires who are like brothers, and Shadowhunter besties. 

Now Everest and Clary are 18 and they're about to have one rollercoaster of a world thrown at them. While Clary pins after Jace and deals with everything involving that mess, Everest deals with an absurd amount of chaos. She has to deal with people going in and out of her life in ways she never thought possible, a new world that she thought she'd only ever read or write about, a sister who has little to no common sense when it's needed, and she's crushing on two guys who just so happen to be crushing on each other as well as her. But, to top it all off, Everest Fairchild has ADHD and is having a hard time keeping up with everything and keeping herself from having an Emotional Overload in the middle of the Institute or worse-lose herself to her own chaos.

title: The Hunted { old version }
description:
They call them enforcers-They are the ones that come in and clean up when laws have been broken. They are the most feared and strongest of us. They were the ones who couldn't live peacefully in the packs so they decided to make use of them. Soliditary wolves with alpha personalities. 

I am not like them. I'm worse. I'm a considered a rogue. Something that must be hunted down an exterminated. I'm not a bad person and I've never hurt anyone in my life but my wolf, I can't control her when I shift. We saw something when we were young. My whole pack was slaughter before our eyes and now my wolf is like a wounded animal she lashes out at times unable to tell between friend and foes. A uncontrollable wolf is dangerous in a pack. That is why I chose to live as a rogue, hiding from the werewolf committee and their laws.

Luckily I've learned to blend in very well but when I end up in the wrong place at the wrong time my peaceful life quickly comes to an end. Now I'm the prisoner of the enforcers who should have killed me. Why haven't they killed me? Well because by some cruel trick my mate turned out to be their leader. Now I'm stuck with someone who isn't sure if he should kill me or if he should take me to his bed. Don't I get a say in any of this? 


How could this possibly get any worse...

Cover by @PANANABELS

title: Sagesse ☾ Derek Hale {2}
description:
☾ ✩ What you are doesn't define who you are...but can you know who you are without knowing what? ✩ ☽


While settling into the small town of Beacon Hills, Abigail Argent has met some of the best, and worse, people in her life. She's thought her life couldn't get any more difficult until she's bitten by Peter Hale and it mysteriously heals. This leaves Abby with no clues leading her to know what she might be. 

Besides her own name. 

With the help of her closest friends, family, and one person who might mean so much more, she is determined to find out the meaning of her existence.

No matter what the truth might be.

title: Klaus's Daughter »»» TVD
description:
Klaus has a daughter.

Her name is Alexia Mikaelson. She's a fighter a survivor, sarcastic, caring, nice and temperamental. She stood by her fathers side since the beginning. She loves her father and her family she'd do anything for them. She would die for them.

But in 1497 she did something to betray her father and uncle. She helped Katherine Pierce escape her fate. When Klaus found out he was furious. Alexia always feared Her fathers temper so she ran. She ran with Katherine and for over 400 years they stood by one another. They got close to one another and became bestfriends...sisters.

But they separated after they left Mystic Falls in 1864.But when they were in Mystic Falls Alexia fell in love with a certain blue eyed and black haired Salvatore. And even after 164 years she still loves him.

What would happen if Alexia and Damon reunited after 164 years? Will they be together again or will she fall for another? And what would happen if Alex see' s her father again?

title: Forgotten Memories
description:
Forgotten...That is what Hope Mikaelson is to everyone she cares about, the love of her life now with her best friend, her family only seeing a girl they don't recognize in pictures, it filled her with sadness. But with being forgotten there's also a fresh start.

Erased...That's what Stiles is to everyone he cares about, every memory every thought every belonging was gone, not a single picture held his image. His pack had forgotten him, the love of his life now doesn't have the slightest idea he existed much like most of his life. But being taken by the Wild Hunt leaves something behind, a remnant, an echo. And what he left behind was something he and Lydia made together and gave up without a second thought...Their baby.

I don't own any characters.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Teen Sorcerer
description:
Stiles Stilinski is tired. Tired of being ignored and forgotten once the research is done. After defeating Gerard and freeing Jackson from the Kanima he thought things would improve but somehow it got worse. Derek is focused on building his pack which includes the newly rescued Erica and Boyd, freed after Allison realized her grandfather was nutso, and the freed Jackson who narrowly avoided being shipped overseas by his parents. Scott is focused on his neverending relationship drama with Allison and his new best bud Isaac. Left alone more often than not, Stiles feels everyone is moving on without him so he looks for his own path.

When Deaton is unable to help him with his Spark he looks elsewhere and finds others who help him along until he finds himself meditating in his room and is surprised by an Astral form that shows up. Unknowing attracting the attention of the new Sorcerer Supreme, Stiles discovers that he might be able to not only help Dr. Strange, but he just might find out how he can protect both his home and those jerks in what he considers his pack - whether Mr. Hale or Mr. McCall consider him or not.

This work belongs to G8rguy. This work belongs to the Sorcery & Werewolves series.

title: Pursuit of the Whole
description:
Sometimes Julia wonders if werewolves are born with half of their soul. If that isn't the case, then why would they spend so much time searching for someone who can complete them - soulmate. 

Julia isn't a werewolf. 

She's a hunter.

Hunters can never understand the reasoning behind werewolves' obsession over their other half. If it comes, it'll come and if it doesn't then it doesn't. 

Maybe, that's why werewolves and humans could never learn to live in harmony. They're simply too different. 

Julia doesn't think too much about it though. That is, until she's mated to a werewolf - an Alpha.

title: In This Together ▷ Stilinski
description:
[ BOOK TWO ]

❝ fear is a proof of the degeneracy of the mind. ❞

Kasey McCall has been through more than enough of supernatural drama over the last year or so. Just when she thinks that maybe she can get a taste of being a normal teenage girl, she's sucked away from it. Human sacrifices are plaguing Beacon Hills, and once again Scott and his pack take it upon themselves to try and save the town. When they are finally able to put an end to the Darach's reign... a much more dangerous evil steps in it's place, in the form of Stiles Stilinski and Kasey McCall. 

You can only stay sane for so long, especially when losing your mind can win the game of life and death.

title: Monster (Twilight X Reader)
description:
After a night (Y/N) (L/N) was attacked by a monster of some sort, things were never going to be the same. So she leaves from New York City to Forks, Washington only to meet people that may be more of use than harm.

description:
HOW DO YOU FEEL ABOUT ME?

"I said I love you, and I don't expect you to say it back...you love her, and that's okay"

•••

After coming back from her summer in France, Katherine Stilinski had expected to simply go through her sophomore year like normal teenagers did; crying over math homework and trying to figure out how to tell her crush her feelings.

But she finds herself unable to stop the dominos from tipping over when Theo Raeken, an old classmate of her brothers shows up in Beacon Hills; and Stiles doesn't trust him.

Through ups and downs and everything in between, Katherine does everything in her power to keep hold of her friendship with Liam while maintaining her feelings, only to be all but abandoned when he falls in love.

With someone who isn't her.

The bond that keeps her alive and the ghost that starts following her around, protecting her. It will be revealed to her along with supernatural secrets.

Kol Mikaelson is unsure what ties him to this teen girl but the more he gets to know her, the more that he doesn't want to leave her side. He will do anything to ensure that his little siphon is safe and happy, even if it means having to go against the only family he has known.

The bond that ties him to her soul and the magic that revolves around the two, ensuring their union. The promise of what they were both missing.

title: The Unpredictable Tribrid
description:
"Dean! Is that my pie?" 

"Whaph." He said with his mouth full of apple pie. He still didn't realise it was her because the pie was filling his taste buds. Best freaking pie ever!

He looked in her direction as he watched her eyes change from her beautiful brown eyes to a pearly white and the white of her eyes turned black. 

Shit... he got caught.

He stood up as fast as he could to make a run for it but it was a difficult task to do if he was choking. Her showing up out of nowhere and catching him eat her pie gave him a fright that he forgot to swallow properly. 

Well, it didn't matter. He'd rather die of apple pie than by the hands of that woman. 

Knowing her, she'll probably resurrect him just to kill him again.

----------------------------------------------------------------

Dean Winchester came across Athena Mikaelson by accident or was it fate? Either way, her very existence and mannerisms challenged everything he was raised to believe.  She was a walking contradiction. She was the definition of yin and yang on her own. She is light and she is darkness.  She is safety and she is danger. She is good and she is bad.

The only question is, will she be the hero or the villain in Dean Winchesters story?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"We convince ourselves that its better that we never dream at all. But the strongest of us, the most determined of us. We hold onto the dream."
~Meredith Grey

I love everything from medical seasons to historical, Sci-fi, comedy, action, thrillers, crime-fiction and so much more. All of those apply to what kinds of books I love.
Oh, one more thing, I love a good plot twist that makes you think 'Shiiiit! Noooo, I did not see that coming!' and even though some are bad, it's still good because unpredictability is something I love and don't.

Hi, I'm Night Owl, I have a confession to make... I'm a bookaholic and love a good dark poem now and then, mhm most of the time (shrugs).

Now, if you'll excuse me, I've got a book to read and some writing to do.

P.S I'm addicted to writing as well.

So, to my fellow bookaholics and writing addicts (writingaholics didn't sound like a good made up word) and strangers and friends...

*Hey! Write or read or dance or sing(whatever makes you happy) to your hearts content because life is too short to do otherwise.

And life is a royal pain in the ass.

But it can also be a royal joy in the... Never mind, that didn't sound so well typed out as it did in my head.*

'Don't give up now
chances are
your best kiss
your hardest laugh
and your greatest day
are still yet to come.'
~Atticus

title: 𝐌𝐘 𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘 𝐖𝐄𝐀𝐊𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒, Damon Salvatore [under editing]
description:
𝐌𝐘 𝐎𝐍𝐋𝐘 𝐖𝐄𝐀𝐊𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒. ❝You, Olivia Campbell, are a complete mystery to me and I hate it. I hate not knowing everything about you. It drives me crazy.❞ ❝I'd drive you even crazier if I told you the truth.❞ ❝Maybe I can handle it.❞ ❝I wouldn't be so sure.❞

Olivia Campbell is the only tribrid in existence and for centuries, she's kept it a secret; running and hiding from those trying to use her as a weapon. She remained isolated, keeping up her walls and never letting anyone in. That's all she's ever known.

However, when moving back to her home town, one she hasn't lived in for centuries, everything starts changing. And when curiosities rise about her and new encounters try to bypass her walls, she finds herself changing as well, in a way she would've never expected.

As time goes on and new and familiar faces reveal themselves, she finally gets close to finding out the truth. About the forgotten memories of her past. About how she came to exist. About who she is... What she is...

title: Lady and the Wolf [Book One, Lady and the Wolf Series] -Published-
description:
"Fate is tricky and her time is limited. She can love without reason, and forgive without thought - that is her curse and her gift. Be that as it may, the wolf will remain by Red Riding Hood's side for all eternity, for she is a lady, and he, a monster." - Aleksandra Volkov.

Van Volkov was born with a curse, a demon that lives inside of his mind, and a promise to protect. Having lived his entire life for the sake of others, he has created a steel wall that surrounds himself - impenetrable, just like his heart. Revered as a God by humans and a murderer by his own kind, he lives in secrecy, letting few humans know that he is one of four pure lycan's left in the humans world. 

That all changes when he rescues a human child after her family are killed by rogue shifters. Vowing never to acknowledge her existence or his rare act of kindness, he struggles with the fact that she could be the key to breaking down his steel walls and unlocking his buried humanity. 

But how do you find your humanity when you're not really human at all? 

Aira Blight was six years old when she witnessed her entire family's death. Taken in by a doctor and his kind wife, Aira slowly but surely recovers from the trauma. As she grows, Aira is supported financially and academically by a supposed stranger, but she knows her saviour is watching over her, and her one wish is to help her cold and angry hero feel compassion and love - the same sort of compassion and love he has shown Aira her entire life - although he may not know it.

-----

Published December 15th, 2016. Available on Amazon in Kindle and Paperback.

title: The Heat #WATTYS2019
description:
Every year, two times a year, the Heat occurs. Unmated females with their first heats are let out in an expanse of territory where they are forcefully mated and claimed by the unmated males.

     This year is Cassandra's first heat. And she is determined to come back unmated.




Note: Everything but cliche. This means

- No male Alpha mate
- No winning all the time
- Fears from the main characters
- A nice guy
- No "mine"
- No weak Omega mate
- Grave injuries for the main characters
- Necessary deaths (I'm not the author who writes the names of all the characters on a piece of paper and then picks one haphazardly to kill them)

description:
** COMPLETED **
Growing up in Beacon Hills, Wren Martin's life was as normal as any teenagers. With her sister Lydia, and her two best friends, Scott and Stiles by her side, everything was fine. That was until Stiles came up with the genius idea to drag Scott out into the woods in the middle of the night to look for a dead body. After that, the three friends got dragged into the world of werewolves and other supernatural creatures.

While the supernatural world may seem like a hassle, it's not always that bad. Sometimes it can be the cause of a relationship or bring two people closer. It might also help you learn new things about yourself.

title: The Rejected Mate
description:
Dear Red Demon Pack,

Your pack name really suits you because all you have been to me was evil.

I've tried to reason and tell you what happened to your Luna but you choose to ignore me in everything I do. 

So I'm leaving don't try to contact me or even say sorry because I will "NEVER EVER FORGIVE YOU ESPECIALLY MY MATE I MEAN SOON TO BE ALPHA."

I hope you all realize what you lost,because one day you'll need me again.

sincerely, 

Tyler, The Chosen White Wolf 

PS: I will be back for revenge 

After getting rejected by her other half all she wants most is revenge.

title: Daddy's Pet (on hold)
description:
Luca is a third-person speaking, mentally stunted werewolf who has spent entire life in a 'pet shop'--a slavetrade facility run by vampires.

Pet shops sell various werespecies of perfect linage, tamed and bred in house. Luca isn't considered perfect. The werewolf was born a runt and has the mind if the child. 

In a desperate attempt to rid themselves of him they hold a Clearance Day to try and get rid of other unsellables like Luca. 

Tanner is an ancient, powerful vampire. He thinks he has everything he needs. But when he accompanies his friend to a slavetrade event he finds himself drawn in by an adorable werewolf who asks to call him to Daddy.

*Warning: contains ddlb content, mature situations, age play, strong language, and mentions of abuse*

description:
Once it was read that "to lose, it meant that you had something" but what can you do after you lost everything that ever gave you meaning? 

Emma Gilbert has experienced loss and grief her entire life; being abandoned by her biological mother, never fitting in anywhere she went, losing her adopted parents, her bond with Elena and Jeremy fading with the good memories, and slowly losing herself after death knocked on her door and refused to take her away. 

What will happen when the Salvatore Brothers come back to Mystic Falls and everything changes?

title: Runt (BoyxBoy)
description:
Runt doesn't know what his real name is. He's been called that for his entire life by everyone he knows, and cannot remember being addressed as anything else. Runt is an albino in both wolf form and human, and is abused by his pack for it. When his brother, the alpha of the pack, sees an oppertunity to throw him away, he takes it. So, Runt is thrown into a new pack with new faces and new ways of thinking. 

The only thing stopping Runt from enjoying himself to the fullest is that aching feeling he gets whenever he sees the alpha of his new pack, Rowan. How can he go against natural instinct when he knows that the only way for a pack to thrive is by the alpha reproducing?

title: Metanoia | BTS ff (werewolf au) [Under Editing]
description:
She didn't know where she was but that place felt like home. 

She didn't know how? Or why? But it just did, and surprisingly she was happy to call that land her home.

Nobody could ever imagine, under all those calculations and professionalised and advanced steps and methods there existed a time lapse that was beyond human understanding. There existed a land where every little detail, every element shone with the invincibility of its magic. 

Far from the malicious clutches of the predatory humans there existed a realm where love was the only money one could ever earn. 

The Forgotten realm of Dalisay.
_____________________________________

They didn't believe in the prophecy but it wasn't a mere myth. Engraved on the rocks, written in the stars and carried by those hushed whispers, the prophecy came true. 

A human soul found her way into their lives, their realm.

But the real question was,

Were they ready to let her in?
Were they ready to accept her?
...........

Get ready for a journey filled with magic and mystery 
Get ready a for tale about finding warmth and comfort 
Get ready to fall for the boys even more.

title: Defying The Alpha (COMPLETED)
description:
HIGHEST RANK: #4 as of 3/8/17 *PLEASE READ AT YOUR OWN DISCRETION, THIS BOOK WAS WRITTEN WHEN I WAS 16 YEARS OLD, THIS BOOK IS NOT PERFECT BY ANY MEANS. PLEASE BARE THIS ALL IN MIND WHEN READING.*
 
"Your defiance isn't appreciated, Angel." Adrian murmured into my ears, causing shivers to snake their way down my spine.

"You're dominance isn't appreciated, alpha." I sneered while leaning away from him and his masculine scent.

"Dominance is something that you will get used to, I will always dominant you, I am above you, you may be my mate but I will always be your superior. Don't forget it. Adrian explained in a harsh voice.

"Well defiance is something that you'll get to because I will constantly defy you, you may be my mate but I'll always defy you, alpha."

"I'll break you-you defying little she-wolf." Adrian replied with a wicked smirk.

"You won't, you can chain me up, lock me up, anything, I will never surrender to you."

***

Angel has always been defiant, more defiant than most wolves. When her family grows sick of her defiance they send her off to the most deadliest alpha of all; Adrian Nixon. Learning Adrian is her mate she is thrown into a world of chaos where she faces abuse, kidnapping, devious alpha's and a darkness she never knew was possible. Angel is the light to Adrian's darkness, so will she guide the ruthless male? Will she submit to his  dominating ways? Or will she defy him and eventually lead herself to freedom?

title: 5 Princes and I(Preview Only)
description:
She's Rosalie Amber Stan. A simple teenage girl, who made a wish to have a more adventurous life, was a victim of a teenage-nap by the Fae queen to a different realm. She was brought to a castle with 5 gorgeous supernatural princes: a flirty vampire, twin wolves, a dashing warlock, and an arrogant elf, who are fighting for the throne. The queen gave her a task to be the one to choose the future heir to their kingdom. Little did she know that the queen only wanted one thing from her and the princes: Romance.       

 Now that she had gotten her wish, all she wanted to do was to take it all back. To be back to her old world where things seem a little more....normal. And with no prince bugging her all the time.

title: Burn It Down || Stilinski || Book One
description:
[BOOK ONE]

"You have me, okay?" Stiles told her seriously, and then dropped his voice into a whisper. "You'll always have me." 

^*^*^*^*^*
Normal people struggle to get through four years of high school but it's nothing compared to what Sierra, Scott and Stiles face on a daily basis. 

Once Scott is bitten, their lives are completely flipped upside down as they're thrust into the scary world of the supernatural. A crazy alpha murders victim after victim, but what's the pattern? 
Then later they thought everything would return to normal until a new terrifying homicidal lizard starts paralyzing their friends with a sole purpose of causing death and destruction. 
Who is the Alpha? Who is the Kanima? More importantly, what is Sierra? After something happens, everything she thought she knew changes. She fights a tough battle against herself, in order to keep others from getting hurt. 
All Stiles wants to do is help and vows that whatever they go through, he will always be on her side. 
The pair faces many challenges but as Scott told them, they're Stiles and Sierra. Nothing could ever break the connection they shared. Right?

[TW Seasons 1&2]

title: Demon: Book 1
description:
-Demon Series: Book 1-
    
    Aden Perri has problems.
    	The last day of school his girlfriend calls it quits.
    	And proceeds to move on a little too quickly.
    	His friends disappear, leaving him to spend the summer alone.
    	His mother buys a dog. 
    	Aden hates dogs. The scar on his leg confirms it. 
    	And his new job titles are garbage collector and toilet scrubber.
    	At least he'll be out in nature, excepted he hates the outdoors.
    
    Aden's ready to barricade himself in his room, until school starts back up in the fall. His mother won't allow it, and his father is ready to do some character building. 
    	They drag him out and drive him to Beaver Lake. His father loads him with a bucket and a mop and sends him off to clean campground toilets. The local campers just laugh at the poor garbage boy wandered around picking up after them.
    	All but one. One very strange, shirtless, barefoot boy who Aden will never understand. But the boy makes it bearable, so he'll let him stick around. It's not like Titus is really going to give Aden a choice anyways.

title: Twilight: Hayley Swan < The Werewolf
description:
Hayley Swan is Bella Swan twin sister. They are not identical twins. Some of Charlie ancestors were werewolves. So the werewolf gene was given to Hayley. She isn't a shapeshifter. She was wolf that could shift under a full moon. Hayley also has vampire instincts. She has vampire speed. She has super hearing. Some would mistaken her for a vampire but that's not the case. So Charlie calls his daughter and asks for her to come home because Bella is depressed with her boyfriend leaving her. Charlie also invites Billy and Sam and his gang. What happens when Hayley meets the wolf pack? What happens when a pack of shapeshifters and a human imprint on Hayley? Will Bella try to keep the pack away from Hayley or will she let them be? 

Also Seth, Leah, Jacob and Quill already phased. Leah and Sam never dated. Also Sam, Leah and Emily are 19. Seth is 17 and the others are 18 years old. 
New Moon-  Breaking Dawn Part 2

title: Running Out of Time (BoyxBoy)
description:
Gilberto Mendoza (Gill) is a quiet kid. He doesn't have many friends, due to him being gay in a town full of homophobes. He feels like he doesn't belong anywhere. He's adopted, and unwanted by his own mother. He lives with his father, who supports them as much as he can. But Gill's father loses his job, forcing the two to move across the country. Will this new, and strangely secretive town be the same as before? Or will this be Gill's fresh start?
×××××××××
Tobias Greene is all set to be the next alpha of the Crimson Lake Pack. The only thing missing? His mate. And the worst part? He's running out of time to find them. Tobias is willing to do anything, and go anywhere in search of his true love, when all of a sudden, a shy ginger boy and his father move into town, catching his attention instantly. But...same sex mates were unheard of..

---
This book is a boyxboy, and will contain physical content between two males. If this bothers you, then what are you doing still reading this. Go away.

title: Battle Scars {Draco Malfoy}
description:
Warning: If you haven't read the Tightly Knit Series, read the other books first before continuing on or read at your own risk!

Clara Easton had a more than decent life before the start of the Second Wizarding War. Upon her first year she was sorted into Hufflepuff, made friends and enjoyed her schooling for the first few years. She was kind soul and described as beautiful by her peers . She lived up to traits of her house dedicating herself to working hard and remaining loyal to those she loved, especially when the Battle of Hogwarts arrived. She, along with hundreds of other students remained at the castle to defend their school and secondary home against the Dark Lord and his followers.
    
    During the battle, Clara fought bravely, but it wasn't enough to save her from the damaging scars she received from a werewolf attack. She was thankful to survive the attack, but it left her with scars that she could not hide from her peers. At first, she wanted to hide herself from the world, but the need to complete her education brings her back to Hogwarts once more where she ends up seeing a person she least expected to return.
    
    
    Draco's seventh year didn't go exactly how he envisioned it would, with the responsibilities of a Death Eater looming over his head, Draco felt like he never got to experience his seventh year properly. He returns to Hogwarts, fully aware that his previous actions have left him with a tarnished reputation that he is certain he cannot recover from. At least not without a little help and the last place he thought he would find help would be from a Hufflepuff.
    
    Slowly, the two students realize that second chances are not given to make things right. But are given to prove that one can be better even after they fall.
    
    *Part of the Tightly Knit series*

title: The Disgraced of the House of Black - A Multi-Character Fanfiction - Part One
description:
Every family has its black sheep...even the Black family. 

Althea Black. When she was young, she never understood why her mother refused to speak of her father. As she grew older, it began to not matter who he was or had been. She had her mother and that was enough. As she begins her third year at Hogwarts with her best friends Harry, Ron, and Hermione, her world changes as suddenly her family's secret relation to the infamous mass murderer Sirius Black might be enough to cost her her dearest friends. 

Amara Black. Drowning in grief, she wrestles with the loss of her husband as the wizarding world celebrates the vanquishment of Voldemort all the while pointing fingers of blame at the love of her life, Sirius. 

Eliana Black. She lost the only real family she had ever known after the loss of her father when her cousin Sirius was arrested and Amara went off the grid. With only her daughter Althea left, she has to continually fight against her impending loneliness. 

Contains flashbacks to their time at Hogwarts, yielding some marauder's era content as well as Harry's era and post-war era.

Several romances included, including ones involving Remus Lupin, Harry Potter, and Sirius Black. Three original characters are also included, whose stories will provide a unique perspective into the war. More details included within.

title: 𝐒𝐎𝐔𝐋𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐒
description:
A soulmate is someone with whom you feel a deep affinity and empathy in the friend way, but especially, in the love way.

In Alessandra's world, soulmates exist. You can hear what your soulmate's listening to, regardless you're not from the same universe, and will find each other no matter what.

Alessandra had a perfect life, A wonderful boyfriend, a loving family, a professional career. She's accomplished every single one of her dreams. And now, it was time to get married.

Everything was perfect, until, a few minutes before walking down the aisle, she hears something... An unknown melody, along with a voice that makes her heartbeat raise.

-Please wait. I swear I'll find you. - Edward begs in a whisper as he hears the Wedding March.

Alessandra will have to make a decision. Get married and keep her perfect life, or find her soulmate.

description:
He just kept smiling while shaking his head. "After you, Snowflake," he said, sweeping his hand, but I only growled at him, thoroughly unamused by the name.

"Call me Snowflake one more time--" I started, my voice low, but he seemed unfazed by it.

"Your death threats are getting stale, do you not think, love?" He asked, emphasizing the last word with a raised eyebrow.

When she took on the dare, the last thing she expected was to be captured like a wild animal and brought to a grand palace belonging to one of the three Gordon boys. She certainly didn't expect to play the part of a Protector or to constantly question her emotions for a pair of arrogant, blue eyes. (First installment of the Gordon series. title: A New Beginning
description:
Percy knelt before three of the gods. His hair was messy and his skin pale. His eyes were red rimmed and puffy and his cheeks tear stained. 
"Percy? What are you doing here so late?" Lady Hera asked. 
"I have a request." Percy said in a croaky voice. 
"Anything for the saviour of Olympus." Lady Hestia replied immediately. 
"I wish to die."

When Annabeth breaks Percy's heart and turns everyone against him, he begs Artemis, Hestia and Hera to kill him. Not wanting their favourite hero to die, they give him a new purpose to live. As the hunts new guardian.

title: The Raven - Born Out The Earth
description:
'"I cannot feel this way. You clearly don't feel-"

"I do though." He interrupts me. I finally look up to meet his eyes. It holds so much sadness. "Believe it or not but it hurts me every time I see tears in your eyes." His hands reach for my face, one more time and gently wipes the tears off my face. No matter what, the tears keep flowing down. "Please don't cry." He whispers.

"You have someone out there just for you. Waiting for you." I whisper softly. A sad smile forms on my face that is now saltier than the ocean bed itself. I try to tug his hand off my face, but his hold is firm. He leans his head down and places it against mine. "I know." His whisper equally soft.

"You need to let go. Just as I am." I close my eyes and take in the breeze of ocean that surrounds him and now me. I hear a deep growl just as his hold tighten on my face but it's still gentle.'


For the little Raven that was born out the woods, life was only about the survival of fittest. Hunt or be hunted. Until Aya came along and showed her that there was more to life. They became family, sisters and promised to stay together forever. But what happens when one of them finds their mate?

Read along to find out the story of Amara Raven on her journey to find a place she belongs.

Completed: 12/05/20

Can be read alone!

title: AEGIS ↠ EMBRY CALL [R.U]
description:
"When you see her, everything changes. All of a sudden it's not gravity holding you to the planet, it's her. Nothing else matters. You would do anything; be anything for her."

     ❖❖❖❖❖

 
After the death of their parents, Reed and Callas Quinn move back to the small community of La Push, Washington, to live with their grandparents.
 
The Quileute Reservation, where they had grown up, seems even more welcoming and home-like since they moved back. Although, Reed remembers it slightly differently to his younger sister, Callas. Mainly because he was the one who was told by his grandparents about the legends of the tribe, the legend about being descended from wolves and how the wolves were their brothers still, and genuinely wanted to believe that maybe, just possibly, that it was true.
 
Unlike her brother, Callas was never really phased by the legends that their tribe had brought them up on. She couldn't really remember much of the stories anyway, being so young when their father took them out of La Push to live somewhere else, after the death of their mother had taken a toll on him.
 
But returning once more, ten years later, with Reed being almost twenty and more able to look after his sixteen-year-old sister, he falls back into the comfort of the legends and myths of the tribe. Maybe too comfortably. While Callas sees it as an opportunity to finally be back to her roots, back to her loving grandparents and ageing dog, and to finally feel like she belongs.
 
Callas wasn't the type of person to mind moving, having done it for over half of her life. So, transferring to La Push High School wasn't weighing heavily on her mind. But accidentally bumping into a group of russet-coloured skinned boys, while in her own mind, did.
 
Her connection to the boys was almost instant, which put Reed slightly on edge. Especially if he believed the legends to be true.

Sarah Stilinski is only a few years older than her brother, and she's been living far from home for college. That is, until she suddenly returns to Beacon Hills without notice- taking a break from her grad school's campus. She doesn't tell why she's returned, but her father and brother know that something is wrong with Sarah.

To make her return even more surprising, she finds out that Derek Hale, someone from her past, has also returned to his home in Beacon Hills. She is determined to find out why, and maybe let the one secret she's kept since high school slip out into the open.

title: Thicker than Blood - Book One (Watty Awards 2012)
description:
Book One in the Soul Seeker Series.

At fifteen Amelia is forced to move in with her birthfather when her mother passes away. A man she's never met before in her life, stern and unfair, he is almost never at home and forces his family to move whenever his job calls for it.

For three years Amelia has looked after herself and her younger brother Hayden but when she tranfers to Riverwood High everything changes. She finds herself friends there despite the efforts of her stepsister.

One teacher in particular takes an interest in her, the 25 year old Nathaniel Flynn. The first time he laid eyes on her he knew, he just had to have her.

At eighteen Amelia has to look after her baby brother, hold her own against a stepmother and mean stepsister and battle feelings she's never felt before. After all... Dating your teacher is forbidden, not that Nathaniel seems to care about that.

Add into the equation that both her new found friends and teacher aren't who they say they are... Their diet consisting mainly of blood.

title: NERIS (BoyxBoy)
description:
Calvin Hunter is the  son of his Pack's Beta. He is gay and proud of it but he doesn't rub it in anyone's face. If they know then they know.
  
  His 19th birthday is approaching, this is an extremely big deal to everyone but him.. This birthday means he's going  to find his mate but Calvin doesn't think he'll find his mate. I mean that's what everyone's told him since he came out the closet. 
  
  The day of his birthday he finds his mate, and his hopes rise just a little. Maybe he could be happy now. Only one minor problem.....his mate is the homophobic Alpha Jr. , Stryker Thorn .  
  
  When Stryker rejects him it was nothing unexpected although it did hurt him, more than he'd ever admit.

title: The Unveiling Truth [TVD FanFiction]
description:
Laura Gilbert is the younger sister of Elena Gilbert, the sassy and sarcastic twin. The most popular girl in school and on the cheerleading squad standing in as the vice-captain beside her best friend, Caroline Forbes. 

Laura hates being told what to do, especially from her sister. She's always been compared to Elena and she hates it. She's jealous because every guy wants her.

Little did she know, Laura was about to have her turned upside down when she meets Damon and Stefan Salvatore. They have a secret; they are vampires.

Laura finds herself attracted to Damon but she already has a boyfriend, Tyler Lockwood, the jerk in everyone's eyes. She becomes heartbroken when she finds out he's been cheating on her with Vicki Donovan and broke up with him. 

She finds herself falling in love with Damon every day... but what does he think of her?
Damon only sees Katherine, his life's obsession. 

Can Laura forgive him for using her as a replacement? 

That's not all... Laura (and Elena) is the doppelgänger to the Petrova bloodline, it's a curse that will bring her every misfortune. 

Katherine has return wrecking havoc everywhere she goes.  Inviting the gang to play one of her petty games.

But that's not the worst of it. 

The Original vampire Klaus is ready to break the curse and is on his way. But unexpectedly he gets a sudden interest with Laura. Because she looks like a certain someone... Tatia... The Original Petrova doppelgänger. 

Where does Laura's fate lie? Will there be a chance for her and Damon to begin?

(First Book)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey guy! Welcome to my home page, I hope you'll enjoy reading my books.

I like to be  creative and write down my ideas, thoughts and feelings down onto paper and form a story to every one to enjoy because it gives me a sense of achievement.

I generally get my ideas through watching a lot of TV shows and reading a lot of books and I'd be very happy if people leave comments or just send me a message to tell me how I'm doing.

Right now I don't have much, just The Vampire Diaries and The Originals fan fiction but definitely in the future there will be more. 

Just a warning, I am slow with update because of personal issues and sometimes enter a writer's block. So there will be periods of nothing from me but I will never leave you guys a no ending. Also my English is not that good, so I'll make a lot of grammar errors.

So just bare with me on that.

One last thing; if you guys don't like my front covers, I'm more than happy for you guys to go ahead and make me one and send it to me. I'm happy to make it my front cover.

Anyways, I hope you guys will give me a chance and be patient with me and I will try my best to update as regularly as I can.

Let's go!

title: The Crimson King
description:
Iris is a Lycanthrope. A moon-child, born into a world fantasy and dreams. 
However, raised in isolation, she has no desire to venture beyond the comfort of what she knows and loves. 

But beyond the borders of home, the Earth Kingdom - recently released from banishment - is changing, and this change brings a new threat - a race that was suppressed, and now thirsts for revenge. 

And somewhere far beyond, something is calling to her, something that exists beyond reason. 

When fate comes knocking at her door with eyes as cold as a snow filled sky, will she be prepared to meet the one who waits for her on the other side? He is part of a nightmare she had no desire to face, but he holds the key to her very soul. 

And as the escalating war between Lycans and Shifters threatens to harm what Iris holds most dear, how will she answer the call of battle? 

One such as Iris was never meant to sit on the sidelines. Her crown is waiting for her - she just needs to reach out and claim it. 

You thought the battle was over? 
It was just beginning. 

-
THE MONARCHS 

(Circe's Story)
A Pirate's Kiss
A Siren's Crown
A Dragon's Heart 

(Iris's Story) 
The Crimson King
The Scarlet Prince

authorBio:
Come join the Facebook family! I have also recently started an Instagram for my writing as well :) 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/273281456093631/ 
Insta: @daisyinadaydream 

Follow the Facebook Fan Page to read exclusive extras, get sneak peeks about new writing/ APK changes, be the first to be notified about upcoming Chapters and more! 

Daisy was born in Wellington, New Zealand, but lived most of her life down at the bottom of the South Island where she enjoyed running away to the beach, raising too many pet lambs, getting lost in fantasy worlds and putting off her art work till the last minute. 

She currently works as an Atelierista in Christchurch City and also freelances as a Makeup- Artist and Photographer. She watches too much anime, reads far too much fanfiction and writes when she gets the chance. 

Originally Daisy began writing her A Pirates Kiss series when she was 15 years old (more than a decade ago now) and was inspired by many different novels, movies, songs and art works.  She would like to send a huge thank-you out to all of the fans of APK who supported the series and her writing as it progressed (slowly, and through many hiatuses). Without them, APK would not be the story that it is today and it is truly through their efforts alone, that the series was recognized at all. 

All of her books are COPYRIGHTED. If you steal her ideas, she will come for you. She is almost joking but not quite. It took her a long time to come up with her ideas for her stories, to try and make them original, with fresh content for your enjoyment, please do not copy, use your imagination to come up with your own ideas. 
Please, to anyone who comes across a story that is using her plot line, please let her know, she has had quite a bit of trouble with it in the past. Thank-you!!

And now there is nothing left to say but,
Happy Reading 
Love Daisy x

title: Living with my Possesive Mate
description:
This has to be a mistake. I don't want a mate. No.   "You are coming with me," he states, looking at me coldly as if he doesn't want me.   "What?" I finally find my voice.   But he turns to my father. "My wolf wants her safe and the only way to protect her is by taking her with me."   His wolf. Not him. His wolf.   I stand there numbly as he makes arrangements with my father. This cannot be happening to me.    And this is how I ended up Living with my Possessive Mate who doesn't even want me in the first place.

title: BLUNT. | Liam Dunbar
description:
{ FIRST BOOK OF THE DAUNTLESS SERIES }

Annie Argent has just gone through some of the most shocking months of her life. Not only has her sister recently died, but now she understands what was to blame... the supernatural.

As she's completed her training, her father insists on her staying out of it all. He's terrified she'll end up like her mother, her aunt, or her sister... all dead, but Annie feels the need to help her sister's friends. 

And then the new boy, Liam Dunbar, moves to town, and Annie's world begins to change for this blue eyed youngster. Battling through her grief, enemies, and more... Annie learns the truth about her world.

Then one night... everything changes. 

And none of her training can prepare her for what is to come.

title: Embersteel: Legend of the Warrior BlackSmith
description:
In a world where the lines between the mortal and immortal realms are perilously thin, the fate of Jiang Feng-a young man destined for greatness-unfolds in ways that will shake the heavens themselves. Born to a humble blacksmith father, whose secrets run as deep as the forging of steel, Jiang Feng unknowingly harbors a dormant power that will set him on a path fraught with danger, revelation, and unimaginable potential.

Reverse Cultivation, the forbidden art of the heavens; the relentless cycles of karma; divine retribution-these are the forces that shape his destiny, as well as the echoes of vengeance that reverberate across the cosmos.

Armed with the legendary Celestial Dagger, Jiang Feng embarks on a perilous journey to ascend beyond mortal limitations, determined to claim his birthright as sovereign. Along the way, he must master the boundless powers of fate, confront inner demons, navigate treacherous political intrigues, and battle forces both seen and unseen. But even as his power grows, so too does the weight of his choices, for the universe will test him in ways no one could predict.

"The concept of darkness shall cover the world!"

"The Aetherion Dragon endures in chaos!"

As his journey unfolds, Jiang Feng must face the chilling uncertainty of his own fate. Will he rise as the master of his destiny, transcending celestial conflicts to claim his rightful place among the gods? Or will the burdens of the trials he faces shatter him, consigning his name to the annals of forgotten tragedies? Blaze Eternal Flame Codex.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi everyone!  I'm thrilled to share that I'll be writing and updating **Embersteel: Legend of a Warrior Blacksmith** every week, so make sure to follow along for new chapters! Dive into a world of fire, shadows, and divine rebellion as Jiang Feng defies the heavens and battles celestial forces in his quest to become the Celestial Sovereign. 

Also, I'm excited to announce that **The Immortal Legacy (Book 1 & 2)** are back on Wattpad and free to read! These books will be undergoing editing soon, so now's the perfect time to catch up on the story before the updated versions drop. 

Whether you're a fan of epic cultivation battles, intricate world-building, or unforgettable characters, there's something here for you. Don't miss out-join me on this journey and let's explore these worlds together! 

Happy reading, and thank you for your support!

title: My Mate's Betrayal
description:
When you are at your lowest there is only one thing you can do and that is to rise. Our protagonist went through some tough sh*t and then like a phoenix she was born again from her ashes. Every time someone tries to take you down you must not feel degraded or keep wallowing in self pity. Be the champion you wish for to come and rescue you. This story is about one of those people who choose to become their "Knight in shining armour" rather than waiting for one to show up.

A sneak peek of what's inside. Have a look. I am sure you will like it.

"Romantic dates, public declaration of love, standing by her side when going gets tough. Girls were jealous of her for getting such a loving and attentive mate or so she thought. It wasn't jealousy that seared their bond but the hidden truth that she stumbled upon.

Daughter of an alpha, a girl who wears her heart on her sleeve, sheltered from world by her  herculean father, over protective twin and annoying younger brother. A girl that looks at world in good faith. Sooner than later her faith was shredded to pieces.

It happened a week before her 18th birthday. It was a moon less night but her pack was awash with light and cheer. It was for marking ceremony, where she would be marked by her mate and then after a private family gathering they were to leave for secluded wood that were sacred in its own way.  It was a way to welcome her mate into the family and getting to know what was in store for him after they complete their mating when she turned eighteen. All in all it was  a big day and she was supposed to be happiest person alive as nothing seem better then bonding to someone for life that makes you happy and love you for who you are. 

But alas! it was an illusion, a beautiful mirage that ended that day."

To know what happened next you have to tag along, i will only say one thing, HELL HATH NO FURY LIKE A WOMEN SCORNED.

~SK.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Redeeming the Lost (A Comforter's Tale)
description:
Life is always fun when you never get into trouble for causing mischief. Julie is a pro at keeping her packmates on their toes with her innocent fun. It's a perk of being a Comforter and never losing her puppy-like appearance. Admittedly, there are times when her skills are needed, and she takes her job quite seriously then.
She isn't a fighter, but rather, is one who cares for others' hearts. A Comforter. 

After all, who doesn't want to hug a puppy?  But those in need of comfort are often in pain and feel surrounded by darkness. To be a light in someone's world, you will have to walk through the darkness.

---------------------
What do most werewolf books have in common? They either focus on mates or on fighting. I decided to try a more unique route. No romance will be found here - this book focuses on the ties of friendship and hope.

Thank you to Christine Leonardi from DeviantArt for the cover, and to @JimenaVivancoo for polishing it into an ebook cover!

Copyright December 2019. All Rights Reserved. Readers may not copy, alter, or steal this story. Fanfictions are allowed to use my *world* and *werewolf ranks* as long as credit is given.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: He's An Alpha. I'm A Rogue. We're Mates.
description:
"My heart palpitated in my chest as my eyes settled on the beast of the man, my mate, his lips curled away from his teeth and he snarled at anyone who dared to come close to us, it was clear to me, the wolf had completely taken over."

One day Christina Black's family is murdered by rouge wolves right before her eyes, barely escaping with her life Christina and her brother settle in a small town, where they are suddenly confronted by the pack that has taken residence in the town. 
Christina and her brother understand that if they leave the territory they will be killed by another pack but if they stay they will be killed by one of the most ruthless Alpha's in the country.
When Christina is hunted down by the Alpha she is surprised to find that she is his mate. Christina and her brother are pulled into a brand new world where Christina learns the truth about why her parents were murdered and the huge secret that they had been keeping from her, her entire life.

Christina is faced with truths she never thought possible as her entire world comes crumbling down around her.

title: Lunatics {Book 1 ✔️}
description:
''You know how they came up with the word Lunatic?'' he asked. 

I shook my head, feeling like I probably didn't want to know the answer. His lips pulled up on one side in a mischievous, lopsided grin. 

He stepped closer. ''Because all of the worst monsters come out during a full moon.''

------

Lou DeVue has known from a young age that she was different and not in the 'I-think-I-was-left-on-my-parents-doorstep-by-a-wizard' kind of way.  

She can see things. Dark things, usually. 

The darkest, of which, happens to be about her new neighbors. The five boys hold an energy that Lou's gift can't ignore. An abyss surrounds them and Lou finds herself gazing into it, but what happens when the abyss gazes back?

**********************

title: THE PROPHECY [ENG] - Stiles Stilinski & Hope Mikaelson
description:
Two years after the tragic loss of her parents, Hope Mikaelson moves to Beacon Hills to live with her aunts, Freya and Keelin, in search of a fresh start. 
But peace is short-lived, and soon Hope learns she hasn't escaped the dangers of her past. 
A familiar threat has resurfaced, targeting Beacon Hills' werewolves, and somehow, Hope is at the center of it all. 

Stiles Stilinski and his friends are quickly drawn into Hope's world, facing dangers they never expected. And as they face these threats together, Hope and Stiles can't help but develop feelings for each other, even in the midst of chaos.


---
