title: Misty II
description:
Sequel to Misty 
_______________

The wind stopped. The birds rested on the branches. The squirrels peeked out from behind the leaves. The forest turned silent, covering these two souls from the glare of the afternoon sun. 

He stared at her radiant face. 

"We are different," she said softly, guilt glinting in her eyes. "Very different from each other. Our worlds aren't same."

"Moon Goddess never makes a wrong decision. The Mist that your pack has taught you about, is an illusion, my mate." He told her with a small smile on his face. "A trick of mind it is. When you stop believing in its presence, it wouldn't be there. You will be able to see everything clearly."

She cupped his cheek, rubbing her thumb against the bristles. "I can see everything clearly, my mate. I see the border of enmity between two packs."

The smile that showed the delight of meeting his mate, now displayed the fear of uncertainty. But the Alpha blood running in his veins kept him warm. Confidence spread upon his heart as the inner beast told him the universal truth. Furthermore, the touch of his mate would always fill him with high spirit. 

"There can never be a barrier between lovers." He said the ultimate truth to the divine beauty, looking in her mischievous eyes.

Her eyebrows raised and rested back slowly. Raising her chin, she watched him leaning his face downwards slightly in curiosity. Consequently, she brought her mouth closer to his ear, whispering the answer for him and the silent audience present in this forest, favouring him.

"But we are not lovers, my mate. We are enemies."

title: The Werewolf's Pet
description:
Many years ago, the vampires exposed themselves to the human civilization. They had believed they could live among the humans peacefully; however, after years of coexisting, one vampire loses control and kills over one-hundred humans in New York City.

       One by one, the vampires are hunted down and placed in a sector that is heavily guarded day and night. Whenever a vampire tries to escape, he or she is shot at first sight with a gun powerful enough to burst their body into million of pieces.
     
     Outraged with what is happening, the king of the vampires rises against the humans with the help of the king of the werewolves. Together, they conquer the earth. What is left of the human population is forced to either live in sectors--encircled by large walls--or be exterminated into extinction. 

    Now, every year, any human from the ages of eighteen through twenty-one is chosen to go into Bevelon--the capital; the place where the wealthy supernatural beings live. 

     When Kendra gets chosen on her eighteen birthday, she has no other option but to leave everything behind to live with her new master; a dark, dangerous man capable of ending her existence and her family's with the lift of a finger.

     Perhaps, living in the wealthiest place on earth isn't as bad as it appears.

Inspired Obviously by The Hunger Games and my obsession with supernatural beings.

title: Stefan Salvatore's daughter ~ Miracle
description:
Gillian Enid Phoenix Salvatore, daughter of Stefan Salvatore and Katherine Pierce. My dad, who looks like an 18 years old teenager but in reality is 161 years old, is the one raising me. My mother left him and I when I was not even a year old. I sometimes think I was a mistake or that she didn't want me or something like that but than my dad would say that I'm his best present in the world. Cliché right ? Well I'm a 17 years old looking but for real, I'm 144 years old. Yes, I'm a vampire just like my parents. A lot of people say that I have my dad's kindness but also my mom's strength and temper. Anyway...
Dad and I kept moving town to town for years, went to a lot of schools, had a lot of friends and met lots and lots of people. But now, we're back at Mystic Falls. Last time I was here I was still a baby. Anyway... Let's just hope that coming back here was a good idea...

Stefan Salvatore's daughter story
Kol Mikaelson's love story

title: Innocence
description:
A 7 year old boy is saved from horrid circumstances. In his new home he must learn how to live in a pack. He learns that not all family is blood and not everything you think is true in life is.

This is a werewolf book however it is not in the same world as my other books. New world new rules but give it a chance!

This book contains torture and mentions of rape. 

Also this book is NOT BxB or Ddlb.

Story excerpt 

"Put on your tough face CC. I'm gonna get you out of here. Just keep your head down little brother." Ace says holding the back of my neck as he looks down on me.

"Slaves! Present yourselves!" The warden bellows. I stand beside Ace in our cell with my head bowed like a good slave.

"You! Runt! What's wrong with the whore!?" The man asks me and I growl but my lack of wolf makes it weak.

"My Ma is not a whore!" I yell my voice squeaking as I fight the tears. The warden ripps open the bars and picks me up by my neck.

"If she's not a whore than who is your father, runt?" He growls and I lower my head as best I can in his grip. I shouldn't have said anything. It's not like I'll win.

"That's what I thought." He hisses as he throws me on the ground. "You're just a bastard of a whore. Worthless Runt!"
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I grew up with a love of wolves. I had a scholastic book on them that I wore out from rereading. I didn't have imaginary friends I had an imaginary pack. Naturally this developed into an interest in werewolves. The idea of becoming a wolf captivated me. Also the psychological parallel of the beast within man. We all have as beast lurking in our minds... but that's digging a little deep... anyway I like reading and writing about wolves so if you do too check out my stories.

title: One Of A Kind (Klaus Mikaelson x OC)
description:
What will happen when Klaus Mikaelson meets Grace May Lockwood, the older sister of Tyler.  She's the light in everyone's life. She's apart of the Scoobydoo gang of Mystic Falls and catches the eyes of the original. What will happen when she finds out that they are mates? Will she change him? Will she fall in love with the one who she was meant to be with? Forgive him after everything he's done to her friends, her pack? 

"I submit to no one. My wolf may but I don't."
"You have no control over me, ok? So just leave."
"You aren't a monster. And if you were then it works out, we can be monsters together."
"It's not just that she makes him a better person, she does, but he changes her as well." 
Her feistiness draws him in along with her looks but he's been waiting for her or over 1000 years. What happens when her friends discover her relationship to the originals and can no longer kill Klaus, or will they risk it and let their hatred for the hybrid original override their friendship for Grace? Will she be able to survive the madness of this town? Or will she be consumed by darkness and pave her own path?

*I do not own the vampire diaries, the characters or the script. I only own Grace and any dialogue I've added in.*

title: Lost Cause » Void Stiles
description:
❝What's so great about sanity? I don't see you having any fun.❞
  
  When asked to define insanity, a great majority of the Eichen House staff would direct the questioner to a petite brunette by the name of Lita Mitchell. In a building comprised of clinically insane people, too dangerous to roam freely within society, the self-proclaimed lost cause was highlighted like no other. A cold blooded killer like many others, her abnormality came in the form of her mind; her incapability to feel guilt of any form. 
  
  Logically- she would be locked up in the closed unit, safe & sound in her own complimentary straight jacket. But within the illogical & frequently violent walls of Eichen House, everyone knew that wasn't about to happen any time soon. Crazy had yet to be proven contagious, therefore they saw no reason to isolate her- or prevent her from befriending their newest resident. An insomniac with terrifying hallucinations, he seemed innocent enough; surely no harm could result from allowing him to befriend the notorious Lita Mitchell. 
  
  Then again, they hadn't met the demon in his head. 
  
  [season 3B]
  © 2015 // Aly aka @insatiabIe

❝If you're lonely, turn off all the lights and put on a horror movie. After awhile, it won't feel like you're alone anymore.❞

▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀

hi! i'm aly, your friendly neighbourhood garlic bread enthusiast. i'm an intp-t who likes cats more than people. if you're bored and would like to learn more about me, feel free to stick around! i'm twenty-one years of age and i am most definitely the lamest of the lame.

the aforementioned statement was both a rhyme, and depressingly true; my hobbies include spending excessive amounts of time procrastinating, making useless crafts, reading & staying up until sunrise. i prefer the term introverted night owl, rather than weirdo. spooky is my religion, i have a strange obsession with anything horror related, and an inexplicable fascination with true crime documentaries. i'm also a major fan of alternate universe fics, forever a member of the malia tate defence squad and an eternal hater of anything that romanticizes or spreads false information regarding mental illness.

if you ever feel like talking, leave me a message! i'm sort of bad at conversations and have a tendency to kill them in under five minutes, but i'm always happy to listen :-) whether it be serious subjects or fangirling about supernatural (or teen wolf, shadowhunters, lucifer, or containment), i'm always here to chat. or cry, in the event that our conversation shifts to the many deaths of my favourite characters.

title: Oath of the Hunter
description:
On a mission to destroy the last of the Ferreus hunters, River encounters a monster like nothing he has ever faced before; one that is more than a match for his deadly Haze.

A brittle peace has descended over Crescent Valley, but River cannot let his guard down. Haunted by the lurking shadows of the remaining Ferreus hunters, River knows it is only a matter of time before they catch up. He will do whatever it takes to protect his new home and family, so when Matteo's former alpha calls for aid with his own hunter problem, River seizes the chance to get close enough to his old home to attack from the shadows and catch them off-guard. A hunter on the hunt. 

With his new family at his side, River ventures closer to his old life than he ever wanted to go, but secrets lurk in the shadowed woods, and it soon becomes clear that hunters aren't the only threats hidden in the dark. 

Caught in a living nightmare, with dangers looming ever closer and threatening those closest to him, River discovers the harrowing truth behind his silver-lined legacy. 

───── • ⋆⋅➶⋅⋆ • ─────
Status: Ongoing
Story length: TBC

Disclaimer: this is the second book in the Curse of Ferreus Duology and is not a standalone novel.

title: Alpha inmate
description:
رواية مترجمة .



لعبة القط والفأر...

أدركت إيلي أنها فكرة سيئة.


فقبلت الوظيفة لتثبت وجهة نظرها  أنها أكثر من مجرد أوميجا مطاردة بماضيها.
وأنها تستطيع أن تجد الخير في أسوأ الوحوش الموجودة في العالم.

title: The Alpha's Famous Mate
description:
||Highest ranking-29 in werewolf||

• Find the rewritten version on my profile, it's not complete yet but it's written better than this original• 

I guess you could say I live a double life. What am I saying... I do live a double life and it's horrible. I live a life of fame while struggling the struggles of being a teenage werewolf. A white wolf to be exact. 

I'm the rarest of us all. So I'm heavily protected. By my two older brothers and my eight male cousins. Who I live with. Yes I live with ten guys all older than me. Feel sorry for me. Oh don't forget my eldest brother also happens to be an Alpha. 

My name is Melody and this is my story. 

•••

I'm an Alpha, the names Alec.  I'm the Alpha of Silvermoon pack-the strongest pack around. I've been looking for my mate since I took up my title.

Looking for my other half, my Luna. Hopefully I'll find her and soon.

This is the story on finding her, my other half and everything we went through. 

This is our story. 

•

What do you think happened? Did love conquer all?

(This is the first book I've written, so read at own risk)

title: The Alpha Werewolf's Rejected Mate is an Eldritch Abomination
description:
Published on 10/9/24

[Alternative Name: The Botanical Almanac of the Eldritch Being Who Ended Up in the Body of the Alpha Werewolf's Rejected Mate]

"I, Fenris Lowell of the Meute de Loups Pack, reject you, Noah Brink, as my mate." 

After accidentally causing the destruction of his universe and angering his Lord Father, the creator of all things, Nyromlleyotho is banished from the Palace of Absence and sentenced to a mortal lifetime of mortality. 

In order to return home, he is sent to a world of his Lord Father's creation and tasked to raise its energy level to substitute for the one he had previously destroyed. 

When he ends up in the body of Noah Brink, an inhabitant of a supernatural werewolf world, he is unsure of how to proceed. According to his Lord Father's plans, the body is fated to be rejected by his soulmate, the Male Protagonist of this world. 

"..."

Somehow, combatting the urges to eat the Male Protagonist was the last thing Nyromlleyotho needed to worry about. The storyline had completely strayed from his Lord Father's Great Plan and it's up to Nyromlleyotho to fix it lest he wishes to remain in this blasted meat suit for the next mortal century or however long wolf-human mortals tended to live. 

(Perhaps encouraging the development of nuclear weapons in his former domain had not been the best idea after all.)

"A classic Wattpad Werewolf Romance for the Ages"

title: In the Moonlight [Completed]
description:
"Are you stalking me?" His deep voice asked. 

"You wish, that would mean I actually thought about you enough to wonder where you are." I looked away smugly. 

Max moved closer to me until his face was right in front of mine. 

"You're saying you don't think about me?" He smirked, fully knowing what the proximity was doing to me.

"I don't, why? Did you want me to?" I Regained my composure as I moved even closer, our lips nearly touching. 

~~~
Alexa is a normal girl who just wanted to get through school without any trouble. She didn't want any attention. 

She just wanted to leave those nightmares behind, forgetting what happened before. 

However, all of that changes when her mum gets married and she's forced to move to a new city. Leaving everything behind, she hopes to blend in and go to university but life has other plans. 

In the woods, lurking in the shadows is someone who can't stay away and will definitely ruin all of Alexa's plans and change her life showing her that things aren't always as they seem.

How can two people that hate each other be mates? 

To add to the mix, parties, late night discussions and a school trip is sure to add drama to her life.

Warning: this story is sometimes very cliché and has a few of my own twists on it. The guy might make you cry, laugh or blush and wish guys like him existed in real life. (Well, at least further into the story.) 
This story contains swearing and some slightly mature content. You have been warned. 

Best rankings:
- #2 humanxwerewolf
- #1 gift


~This is my first story and I hope you will give it a chance!~ I promise it will get better.

Important: I do not own any of the videos, music or images I use in this story.

description:

KR hasn't stepped foot in Forks since she was 5 years old. After struggling on the east coast against her abusive boyfriend, she flees to her hometown where she learns maybe not everything is how it seems. (Of course it's not lol). Despite her quick befriending of local hottie Jacob Black and the strange residents of Forks, demons of Kara's past might not be ready to let go. We're going to find out what's worse: bark or bite.

title: A Mate for the Latecomer
description:
Previously Rank: #1 New Author, #1 Reject & Rejected, #1 rejection, #1mated, #1 Fiction #1 Alphamate, #1 Beta, #1 Alpha, #5 Romance, #17 werewolves, #1 author #1 Supernatural and etc..
~~~
Elle Langford was once the most dedicated hardworking werewolf in her pack. She used to have many friends and was respected by all. They were her priority and she didn't even have time to look for her mate. Yet when she felt her bond with her mate break, everything turns awry in her world.

The next thing she knew, she was pulled down from grace, marked as the pack slut, and banished from the place she once called home.

Rules were set once they were accepted into another pack. Elle never saw the outside world again nor was she fortunate to have another mate. She watched as everyone in the pack mated, have pups, and lived happily in the pack. She was left with no mate or anyone to feel the spark with.

Yet what happens when her Alpha sent her to another territory for the first time on pack business?

Will she be able to find another mate? Or is it true that her mate died?
~~~
First Book of the 'Rejection Series'
Book 1: A Mate for the Latecomer
Book 2: Rejecting Your Rejection
Book 3: Lie to Me Alpha
Note: All books can be read as standalone!!

title: Wolfsbane // Neville Longbottom
description:
Cassie Green survived the second Wizarding war but not without any complications.

Cassie is about to start her second year as a Potions professor at Hogwarts when a new Herbology professor shows up. The two are drawn to each other like magnets from the very start. But Cassie goes to the Shrieking Shed every month to transform into a being she hates more than anything in the world. Though the Wolfsbane potion keeps her from giving in to the wolf's needs, she still feels like a monster undeserving of anything good in the world.

Will she be able to accept herself again? Will she be able to let herself fall again? Will Neville be able to show her that she is still worthy of love?

slight slowburn <3

title: The Gilbert siphoner
description:
Born as Anastasia Diana Blackthorn, she was the daughter of two powerful witches, Amelia Anderson-Blackthorn and James Blackthorn. Descendant of two old and powerful witch bloodlines.

Fate dealt her a cruel hand when, at the tender age of four, her parents perished in a tragic plane crash. She was soon adopted by her godmother Miranda Sommers-Gilbert, and her husband Grayson. Over the years, Miranda and Grayson became her parents, and their children, Elena and Jeremy, became her siblings. Thus, Anastasia Blackthorn became Anastasia Gilbert, affectionately called Ana. 

The story begins three and a half months after the tragic car crash that claimed the lives of Ana's adoptive parents. The arrival of the Salvatore brothers in town marks the start of a new chapter filled with secrets and revelations. Ana, a siphoner by birth, had kept her magical abilities a secret, known only by her adoptive parents and her mentor, Sheila Bennett. But with the Salvatore brothers in town, the veil of secrecy begins to lift.


I don't own TVDU I only own my characters, my plot line and script.

title: THE ROYAL PACK
description:
" I am the king , I get to decide everything , Not a leaf in my kingdom falls without my permission ,
DO YOU GET IT ?" Roared the alpha of the pack . The entire pack of royal guards fell to their knees quivering in fear as the alpha Jin used his alpha voice .
" I beg your pardon your majesty , I will make sure it doesnt happen again " Yoongi ,  the second prince and commander in chief bowed to his brother. His eyes glued to the ground ,voice trembling in fear as he tried his best not to stammer .Jin walked up to his brother angrily grabbed him up by his biceps, eyes piercing through his soul ,then he placed the edge of his sword on yoongi 's neck with a little pressure making a tiny  cut on his neck to bleed. He gritted his teeth angrily and growled , " I NEED YOU TO BE PERFECT . ALL MY BROTHERS BELONGS TO ME AND WILL ACT ACCORDING TO WHAT I SAY ....IF NOT  YOU KNOW THE CONSEQUENCES VERY WELL  KIM YOONGI..."
Dive into the story of  magic  and werewolf  kingdom with seven brothers trying to live their lives as a family and not just a mere puppet to their brutal eldest brother.

title: Hunter
description:
This is it. He's going to die, and I'll be free. 

At the last second, he moved, and I was suddenly pinned up against the wall, the silver dagger now in his hand. He pressed the blade to my throat, a sadistic grin creeping across his face.

"Oh, Reese," he purred. "Are you in trouble now..."

He leaned closer, his lips brushing my jaw. I inhaled softly.

"Please," I said, my voice shaky...

***

In a world where the human population has been overrun by all manner of supernatural entities, defiance is met with death. Humans are forced to be living blood bags for vampires, test subjects for witches and warlocks, and the slaves and servants of werewolves.

Reese Hearne remembers the time before. When supernatural beings hid in the shadows, afraid to show their faces to the world. The time before Hunters became the prey, before they were tracked down and killed.

Every last one of them.

Except for Reese.

Fueled by a dark past, she wrecks havoc across the supernatural world in Toronto, armed only by stakes, a silver dagger, and a lust for revenge.

Then she kills the younger brother of Elijah Randon, Toronto's Alpha, the Alpha of the largest pack in North America.

And he is not one to forgive easily.

Then again, neither is Reese. 

***

"Unfortunately, Little Hunter, I have my own game to play..."

----

title: Buried
description:
Hate. Contempt. The only emotions Murphy O'Neill is capable of. Hate for Elijah, the Werewolf who brutally and savagely killed his mate.  Contempt for the Alliance, who allowed the murderer to escape.

A string of gruesome slayings in Boston points to Elijah's return, and Murphy is determined to track him down and make him pay for destroying his life. The one thing stopping him? A mouthy, opinionated FBI agent who just can't be told to mind her own business.

Twenty years ago, the Boston Wolf Killer suddenly disappeared without a trace. The killings stopped and the city began to breathe again. Kaitlyn Quinn's father, a detective with the Boston PD, was the last victim before the police and FBI lost all trace.

Special Agent Quinn has been assigned to the FBI's task force to track this killer down.  For Kaitlyn, it's personal. She intends to bring her father's killer to justice no matter the cost. Even if it means teaming up with an ice cold, emotionless FBI Profiler. Everything is not as it seems, and Kaitlyn is thrust into a world she didn't know existed.

To catch the psychotic killer, Kaitlyn and Murphy must put aside their animosity and navigate the thin line the separates their two worlds.

** Buried is the second book in the MASKED series **

title: My Love from the Stars (OC X EDWARD CULLEN)
description:
Being a part of the Avengers was always exhausting for Nova after all she was only ten when she officially joined Avengers and started to fight with them for justice. 

Now, when she is sixteen and was able to adjust in the dangerous lifestyle and was now warmed-up to them, she gets a call from a man claiming to be her father, after various tests it was proved and now she is bound to go to her birth town, Forks as she is still not eighteen. 

The only thing which calmed Nova in the whole mess was that the town she was moving in was small and negligible so there will be no robberies, murders or assaults which meant that she could finally take a break from her daily lifestyle and be a normal teen-ager but, what will happen when she discovers the dark secret of Forks? What will happen when her friend's life is in danger? Will she be able to save her or her enemies will kill her friend? Will she be able to make it out alive or will lose her life in order to save her friend's life? Will she be able to cherish the love she found or will the pure love will turn into a series of disasters? 

  ☆
          
"After all the thousand times I've told you I love you, how could you let one word break your faith in me?"
           
"My mundane suicide bombers are around the city of New York, Alaska, Forks, Paris, Mexico city, New Jersey and Detroit. Let's see how many people you can save..... All the best Steven and Nova"
          
Their lips met in a tender and soft kiss, opposite of what he looked, he handled her with so delicacy that it shocked her. Her eyes closed feeling his warm lips on hers while they moved in synchronization.
      
       "We are in Longyearbyen, baby"
         
I DO NOT OWN ANY CHARACTER EXCEPT NOVA AND HER LIFE STORY ALL RIGHT GOES TO STEPHENIE MEYER!

title: Lair of Beasts [Book I in the Curse Of Blood Saga]
description:
When Aria's father sells her to a stranger from the north, she never expects to be cherished like a daughter. To live in a castle, showered with every luxury. Her sumptuous new life is every young girl's dream. 
But as Aria grows older she can no longer deny the mystery and strangeness of her beloved foster family. Especially the Greyback men. Nor can she ignore the dark menace of the woods beyond the castle.
Aria is determined to unravel their secrets. Above all,  those of Lucian Greyback, the enigmatic and unsettling man to whom she is betrothed. 
When her curiosity gets the better of her, Aria is compelled to venture into the forest and discover the truth. But beneath flesh and blood lies a beastly legacy. And a birthright she could never imagine.

If you enjoyed the gothic, captivating world of mystery in Jane Eyre (but need a little more bite), you will love the suspenseful and alluring secrets of Aria's journey in this book.

title: Alone Until I Met You (Completed)
description:
She has survived. For twenty years she has been running through the woods with the sole purpose of finding a pack that will take her in. Only problem is that no pack in their right minds would take in a scrawling unmated weakling like her. However, what she lacks in strength she makes up with determination. She is set on no longer being a lone wolf.  

He wants nothing more than to be left alone, but for a strong dominate male like him, it is wishful thinking. Even after going Rogue he is still hounded by the mistakes he has made, the packs he has crossed, and the wolves he has killed. A beast like him deserves to be left alone, to wallow in self-pity and hate until the day he dies. 

Was it fated that these two meet or sheer dumb luck?

I have different accounts on different sites (under the username RavenXgirlXlove) so if you have read my story's before thank you for reading them again :) I like to have a wide audience so I can see what everybody likes about the stories. title: Secret Desire
description:
"I shouldn't do this." He spoke as if to himself. "Maybe if I didn't love you so much, I'd be able to resist." He muttered. I finally understood. I took his face in my hands.

"It's not a crime to give me what I want every once in awhile." I breathed. He rolled his eyes.

"I'll give you the world, Jamie....Just not my world." His voice was dangerously low. My eyes shut for a moment.

"I know." I sighed.

Once again his lips crushed mine. I forgot how to breath. For a moment, I forgot how to move. My entire body was frozen while a hot fire spread all over me. He was the hot fire.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Reality bores me. So, I write. And a new reality is born.

title: Insanity | Stiles Fanfic (1)
description:
"Stiles," she said quietly and began shaking her head. "Please, let's not talk about it." 

"No, Maya, I need to talk about it. I-if I  don't have a chance with you, can you please just tell me? I thought I'd be okay with it, but I'm not."

"Okay with what?!?

"Th-the flirting, the kisses, making me think I have a chance with you because it's literally torture." He emphasized talking with his hands taking a step towards her. "Every time I'm around you I want to hold you, to kiss you, to touch and I can't. So if you're not into me, if you don't want this please tell me." 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

       Maya McCall was always jealous of her brother, Scott. Sure he wasn't popular and he only had one friend, but at least he didn't hear voices in his head and see things that weren't there. 

When a string of murders are linked back to a murderous Alpha werewolf, Maya along with friends and family are thrown into the supernatural world. 

While trying to solve and stop the murders, her and her brother have to control their own supernatural abilities while navigating a normal life and love life.


~~~~~~~~~

title: Hope Mikaelson Goes to Hogwarts
description:
Hope Mikaelson is the first of her kind. A Werewolf, a Witch, and a Vampire.  A Tribrid. After the deaths of her parents, Klaus Mikaelson and Hayley Marshall, she seeks out a way to talk to them, a way to know that they found peace. As she does this, her spell backfires and she is transported back in time as well as through universes. She shows up outside the house of one Albus Dumbledore, at the age of 10. When he finds her he places her under the protection of Molly and Arther Weasley. A lovely couple and their many children. At the age of 11, well, the second time, she attends Hogwarts and meets the infamous Harry Potter. How will the two react to one another?

Cover credit to @sacredCHILDwind or Shemrin!!! Go give her a follow!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Silver Wolf
description:
Lily Crawford was once loved and treasured by her whole pack but that stopped on her 14th birthday when she didn't shift like she was supposed to. Instantly she became an outsider, a slave, a stranger in her own pack. She gave up on having a mate and being loved from anyone other than her brother. That all changed when an Alpha from a neighborhood pack visited her pack and uttered the word she thought she'd never hear "Mate".

--

He locked the door behind us, pressing me against its hard surface.

 "Mine" He growled pressing his face against my neck, breathing in my scent.

"Stop that" I yelled, tears streaming down my face. I tried to push him away from me but he didn't budge. "Just reject me already". 

"I won't reject you" His voice was low and dangerous. Was he worse than I thought? He will actually make me think he wanted me and then break my heart into a tiny million pieces.

"Well then I will. I, Lily Crawford reject you Logan Wa-" Before I could finish he slammed me harder against the wall and covered my mouth with his hand. 

"Don't you fucking dare" He yelled punching the door beside my face. I flinched back but that didn't stop him. "I am your mate and whether you like or not you are now mine. And mine means, no one touches you, no one talks to you and no one fucking looks at you" He yelled again. Moon goddess, please help me.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Meant To Be Luna
description:
She's been rejected.

She's been beaten.

She's been used.

She's been made for a position of power.

***
When Kristin Knight is rejected and sold at the hands of her mate, she spends two years in captivity, beaten and used. She keeps up with the time through a sky light window, watching the sun rise and fall, marking each new day without a rescue from the man that put her there.

So, when given a fleeting moment to escape, she takes it and runs with the sole purpose of not being caught. Only to end up in Black River territory, the fastest growing pack in the nation, found bloody and freezing to death at the hands of Alpha Grayson Black's guards. And the last thing she expects to find is that unmistakable pull of the mate bond to an entirely new Alpha - one stronger than she's ever encountered before.

title: React  (shadow hunters)
description:
What if the shadow world had a royal family?

A king? 

When Clary's friend, Liv, gets mixed up in the world of angel blooded humans and demons, she'll have to fight to survive. But with a secret that's been well kept - one that she's just discovering - gets set free, how will she cope? 

Liv isn't what she thought she was, very far from it. And suddenly, her life as a 'normal' mundane is thrown out of the window. She's something that nobody thought to be possible, but nature has its loop holes and so does fate. 

With a dangerous group of people rebelling against the order, threatening to wipe out all life as we know it, Liv will have to join the fight to save human kind. 

Along the way, Liv meets Vin, the king of the shadow world, and a man with a cold heart and lethal ways. After all, he didn't keep his place on the throne by using kind words and gentleness. He's a man to not be messed with, so what happens when he meets the feisty and slightly crazy Liv?


A love story that seems so far fetched that it may not even be real.  


~_~_~_~_~_~_~_~


"Because if I keep kissing you," He whispers, his voice guttural and deep, sending shivers down my spine, "Then I'm afraid I'll never be able to stop."

title: That Butt Naked Godly Being With A Lovely Six Pack.
description:
After the mother of Corinne (Corey) Tyson, falls victim of a fatal wolf attack, Corey's father becomes extremely paranoid  when Corey is out wandering the woods after the sun sets. With her father's extremely vocalized hatred of the wolves that wander the darken woods, Corey feels ashamed that she is fascinated by a wolf that visits her on a nightly basis. After a few visits, Corey comes to adore this blue eyed, brown wolf, and comes to love the fact that with his company just outside her bedroom window, she is brought a odd sense of security and comfort.On one of Corey's late afternoon walks through the woods, Corey is saved by her blue eyed, brown wolf, and after a serious wound to his side, in his place lies a butt naked godly being with a lovely six pack. Fighting overwhelming confusion, the first thing Corey notices, besides the nakedness, is the fact that his bright blue eyes are exactly the same as her wolfs.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello, my name is Jaimi!

In case you're curious,

I am in my mid twenties and addicted to the second life writing gives me. Writing has let me escape reality since I fell in love with the power of story telling back when I was in my preteens.

I am infected with an incurable case of wanderlust; I prefer to go where the wind takes me and as often as possible. Traveling led to scuba diving and now I am hopelessly attached to the sea, I need the water on a regular basis to keep me happy. I recently started a blog that's going to explain why I don't write 100 percent of my free time, surrounding mostly around my world travels. If you'd like to see what trips I've been on lately, or need some encouragement for yourself to travel follow the link below...
https://atravelingmermaid.wordpress.com

I absolutely LOVE to hear from my beautiful fans, questions, comments, anything! I do read everything that people send me, and try my best to respond to everything!

Do you read poetry?
I'm on a site called HelloPoetry, follow the link and take a gander at some of my tidbits...
http://hellopoetry.com/SilentInnocence/

Last but not least, ALL my work is copyrighted...
This includes all chapters, prologues/epilogues, characters and associated content. Any unauthorized copying, broadcasting, manipulation, distribution or selling of this work constitutes as an infringement of copyright. Any infringement of this copyright is punishable by law.

title: Light The Fire || Stilinski || Book Two
description:
[BOOK TWO]

Once a deep and powerful connection between two people has been made they become a vital part in each other's lives and there is no separating them. No measure of distance or duration of silence can prevent the outbreak of smiles and laughter or the strong desire to leap into each other's arms when they come together once more. -Beau Taplin

*^*^*^*^*

Sierra and Stiles were something special. They were always there for one another, especially during hard times, and were always itching to lend their hands to help their best friend, Scott. It took them months to finally gain the courage to reveal their feelings and when it looked like everything was going to be okay, it wasn't. 
Because she left. 
Her summer before junior year was spent with her grandmother and sister, learning how to deal with her new powers as an Empath. When she returns, it's awkward but Stiles knew in his heart that they belonged together. 
Surviving high school as a human was tough enough, but trying to balance school with a supernatural crisis and relationships scream impossible. 
That is because from here on out, everything changes. 

[TW Season 3A & 3B]
Started December 23, 2017

title: Kidnapped by the Alpha
description:
This is back up! I never got around to editing it because I didn't have the time like I thought I would. Enjoy this and the sequel.

Isabelle was jolted awake out of her nightmare quite suddenly. Dazed, she tried to look around but found that her head was held firmly to the pillow under her. Cloth covered her mouth and nose, a sickly
  sweet smell enveloping her senses. Her mind began getting hazy. Chloroform, her mind whispered almost silently. Her vision began tunneling, and she weakly looked up into a pair of icy blue eyes. She stared into those eyes as she was pulled deeply and forcefully into oblivion.
  
  
  Isabelle is a smart girl and not really the girly type unless going out. You would usually see her wearing sweats around the house or outside in her backyard on the beach since she lives on the ocean. So when she suddenly gets kidnapped one day, she wonders what she had ever done to deserve this. She hadn't done anything wrong, at least she didn't think she did. But she learns that there is something about her that is special and that she is not only human.
  
  Meet Jared Gray, the person that kidnapped Isabelle because of her being his mate. He's been waiting since he was 16 to find his mate and now he's 22, about to give up on ever finding his mate. But when he smells her in a  mall one day, he follows her home and decides to take what's his.
  
  Isabelle's life will never be the same again. Will she be able to escape or will she fall in love with her hot and charming kidnapper that she wants nothing to do with? Or will she stay with him and eventually fall  in love?
  
  ---
  
  THIS IS A DRAFT. And I was 15 when I first started writing it so there are many mistakes. Please don't judge too harshly.
  
  WARNING: CONTAINS SOME SCENES OF SEXUAL AND MATURE CONTENT
ALSO, MANY MISTAKES! SOME THINGS I'VE WRITTEN I FORGOT TO PUT BACK IN THE STORY SO THIS NEEDS TO BE HEAVILY EDITED.
  
  Sequel is called Unwinding Fate

title: Shy, Scared, and Weak. I'm the Alpha's Mate.
description:
When you live your life in fear how will you turn out?



 Jillian Sadem might be an Alpha's daughter, but social anxiety runs her life. She always looks over her shoulder and hides when faced with the thought of interaction.
But her calm and quiet life goes to pot one night when a pack crosses their territory.
And Jillian meats her mate.
And this isn't any mate. This is an Alpha. Alpha Kingsley, rules over one of the most ruthless, strong,and stubborn packs in North America. Sadly for Jillian this means becoming the Luna of the Crescent Moon Pack, she will have one of the most social and respect paying ranks in the pack.
 Will Jillian let her anxiety keep her from being Luna? Or can she fight her fears and plow forward?
After all we live in a world where only the strong survive.








*The cover by: _ShiningStars_*
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Originally, my endeavors on Wattpad were solely to enrich my creativity and excerise my limited skills in narrative prose. After sharing my first story as a romantic preteen, I took my leave of the application and did not click "publish" on any remaining drafts.

However, I have always praised fiction as a means by which individuals can illustrate with the calligraphy of written word, a method to reach and teach the masses of historical, cultural, metaphysical, and philosophical concepts. Alphabetical illustration gives way to escapist's fantasies, lover's lyrics, activist's manifestos, and  dreamer's musings and has taught me the delicate balance of those traits.

Note that drafts have been constantly written, though never shared.

I do not consider myself a good writer, and probably never will be- but my critical nature cannot take away from my love of the craft. I hope that my work can be enjoyed, if only by a few, to the fullest extent.

Thank you for reading, 

D.

title: From a Cradle to a Grave
description:
It has been fourteen years since Hope Andrea Mikaelson was announced dead to the world.

Hayley has spent the past decade blaming herself for Hope's death. She has been on the run from Klaus, whom she believes is hunting her to exact revenge for the murder of their daughter.

Unbeknownst to everyone, Hope survived. Fourteen years ago, a mysterious 'someone' shipped baby Hope out of New Orleans to be raised by a family in Great Britain. 

And now, the youngest Mikaelson has been raised into a beautiful girl. Her adoptive family, the Weasleys, treat her as if she was their own. Unaware of the legacy that has been passed onto her by her birth family, Hope grows up believing herself to be an ordinary witch. 

Until she accidentally awakens her wolf genes, that is. In the Forbidden Forest that resides on the grounds of Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, she undergoes her first transition into a werewolf. 

This not only draws the attention her parents, but a few of the Mikaelsons' oldest enemies, as well...

title: Moon's Assassin
description:
Rejected by her mate because she was thought to be weak. 

He was wrong. 

//\\//\\//\\

I hear a sorrowful howl promising vengeance. Hearing the sound I let my head fall back watching the darkening sky as soon the air is filled with hundreds of howls mourning their late Alpha and sending their empathy to their late Luna's suffering. Listening my eyes close as the wind blows, listening to the beautiful melancholy of the pack's song. 

"I always find this type of howl the most beautiful." His voice while was unexpected, was a welcome distraction from my self loathing thoughts. 

"Does it ever break your heart?"

authorBio:
I am currently 28 years old, work full time at the library, and love to write. I have been writing since I was a very young girl. I majored in English Literature in college, took a few writing classes on the side, but my main focus was working towards my bachelors degree to work in a library like I do today. As of August 2023, I achieved my Master's of Library and Information Science degree so I am finally back to writing for fun again.

Writing for me is not something I seek for profit, but for enjoyment. I deal with a lot of anxiety and depression, and so getting lost in other worlds helps me cope with my daily struggles.

My main focus is Fanfiction. I have a page on
https://www.fanfiction.net/u/1912614/
so feel free to follow me. My profile name is Faithy Waithy .

Thanks for checking out my stories. Sorry if I don't respond to a message you send me. The Wattpad app messes up on me a lot so I sometimes don't get notifications. Also, thanks for your patience with The Tale of Amara. It's a slow process but it's moving!

You readers keep me writing!!

title: Hidden Fox
description:
April Rymer needs a change of pace, a change in scenery. Having grown up her entire life as an outcast within her own pack, she's desperate for an adventure that leads her elsewhere, and the hope is that it also leads her to her mate. Moving herself across the country, she hopes to make friends, find her mate, and find a purpose for herself, but it comes with a huge catch. April has to keep a major secret: that she's not even a wolf. 

Never having heard of someone with her ability, April seeks answers that books and myths can't give her. 
But a new life away from home brings new challenges such as keeping her true identity hidden from the wolves she encounters. Can she handle the weight of her secret? What are the consequences if she slips and lets the canine out of the bag?

description:
Becka Swan's life has been flipped upside down, she went from having the perfect boyfriend & the best of friends to everyone feuding again, The Cullens have disappeared & Bella is in wildly depressed state & with the threat of Victoria exacting revenge everything is hurriedly becoming unstuck.

title: Rejected (Werewolf Levi x Witch Reader Soulmate AU)
description:
Every werewolf has a soulmate, chosen for them at birth. Levi hasn't met his yet, and at twenty-eight years old, he's starting to think that he might never find her. However, he tries not to let it get to him, as he has other important matters to worry about. Levi is the pack's Beta - second in command only to the Alpha. It is his job to protect the pack, and with the threat of Rogue werewolves on the horizon, his duty has never been more essential.  Yet, in the midst of all that darkness, there is hope. After many long years of waiting, Levi finally stumbles upon his mate. But what happens when she is something he can never have, when Levi is forced to choose between abandoning the pack...and rejecting her?

"Rejected" was inspired by a story of the same name written by hugs_for_hippies. I would highly encourage everyone to check it out. It's quite intriguing, and I hope that the author finishes it someday.

Glossary of Terms:
Alpha - the leader of a werewolf pack
Beta - the second-in-command of a werewolf pack
Gamma - the third-in-command of a werewolf pack
Rogues - werewolves who have left their packs to live a solitary lifestyle
Familiar - a supernatural entity (usually in the form of a cat or bird) that assists a witch

Coding:
(F/n) - first name
(L/n) - last name
(C/n) - cat's name

title: Alpha Lilly
description:
An Alpha female finds her inner Alpha and grows in power. Will she find her mate? Is he her true mate? What are the Rouges planning? Will her over protective Father lighten up? Will Lilly be able to keep her Alpha? Let's find out together.

Story excerpt 

You would probably love my life. Believe me most people would. I have full run of the place all I could ever wish is given to me at a simple request. I train every day with the best fighters. Then I watch tv hang out with friends. Eat what ever I want. Everything you could wish for at my fingertips. So why do I hate my life you ask?

I open my door.

"Do you need anything princess?" Dalton asks from his perch outside my door.

"Will you ever go back to calling me Lilly?" I ask rolling my eyes at his formality. We grew up together and he was my best friend. Now that he works directly for my father he is bound by father's stupid rules.

"You know I can't." Dalton says as he looks at the ground "Your father would kill me"

"I'm going for a run." I say bluntly and turn my back to him. Dalton grabs my arm.

"Wait you have to get permission" 

I twist out of his grasp and he grabs my other arm. Pulling me into him.

"So concerned with my father Alt? What would he say if he saw us now?" I whispered in his ear. That got his attention and he released me on the spot.

I step away and stand tall. "I could tell father and..."

"You wouldn't" Dalton says with his stupid grin I havent seen seance we were pups.

I lean in "Maybe, maybe not, who knows what might slip, Alt. You know I'm bad at keeping secrets."

"NO! Come on please. I don't want to lose my position. (or my life) You wouldn't do that to me would you Lil?"

I got him. 

As soon as I heard my name slip his lips I knew I'd won. "Tit for tat Alt. I keep your secret you keep mine. Now, I AM going for a run."

Dalton rolls his eyes and reclaims his position at my door. "One hour" he says "or I'll tell your father myself!"

title: Shattered Soulmates, Stone Mountain Shifters, Book 4
description:
Beta Miles Reid and Marissa Hunt have endured a stormy relationship for over a decade. Marissa, known for her dramatic and restless nature, frequently leaves Miles for months at a time, only to return when she wants. Her unreliability destabilizes their relationship, leaving Miles hurt, confused and insecure.

Recently, 22-year-old schoolteacher Paisley Woods joins the pack, and Miles discovers she is his fated mate. Given Miles's past relationship trauma, Paisley agrees to wait a year before their bonding ceremony. However, Marissa returns the evening before the ceremony, believing Miles's hesitation means he still belongs to her.  

Marissa's presence reignites old feelings between them. Miles finds himself slipping back into familiar patterns with her and cheats on Paisley.  Conflicted by his affections for both females, Miles must face the repercussions of past mistakes and the reality of whether he can hold on to a love that was never truly his, or save the one that may never be again.

As everyone grapples with the fallout, Marissa continues to create chaos while Paisley delves into the heartbreak of broken trust as she seeks a path forward. 


#3 Shattered (7/1/24)
#4 RejectedMate (7/1/24)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Melanie is a passionate writer and devoted mother of two adult children. Alongside her supportive husband, Jamie, she navigates the joys of being an empty nester, often with a good book in hand or a story line developing in her brain.

A lifelong bibliophile, Melanie has been immersed in the world of literature since high school, where her first foray into writing involved crafting a romance novel for her English class, complete with its own cover page.

Encouraged by her husband to pursue her dreams, Melanie has embraced her love for storytelling with fervor. She specializes in romantasy, weaving twisted tales of strong heroines who overcome life's obstacles and ensures that every story has a happy ending, with villains receiving their due.

Outside of writing, Melanie indulges in her passion for family history and enjoys traveling. Her greatest joy comes from her family-her husband, children, and beloved nieces and nephews, who hold a special place in her heart.

Welcome to her world, where happy endings and justice are always on the horizon.

title: Star Crossed Liars  ✔
description:
Cover by @auroralust

Available on Goodreads under this title.

Every year, wolves of age from around the country attend their Placing Tournament, the one thing that can single handedly make or break your future.

In this tournament, you are either a decided, undecided, or intended. Decided is for those who know what they want, undecided is for those who don't, and intended is for those who have no choice.

French-born Althea Lavois is ready. She's just turned 18 and ready to take the medical world by storm, leaving behind her parents with a dream of Sanitatem, Pack of Healing.

Until she meets her mate, Orion Westbrooke, an intended and the next Alpha of Vindex, the pack of warriors.

Accepting Orion means throwing away her dream, so what's a girl to do?

Lie, of course.

-------------------

I had no idea whether or not he had followed me, or seen which building I went into. I would need to be careful, I knew for a fact that he was just on the floor above me.

No one could know, not even my parents. I was not giving up my dreams just because I had found my mate. Not a chance.

I knew he would make me. I could tell. But either way, I didn't want to take the chance.

Everything hit me at once.

I had found my mate.

He was the next Alpha of the Vindex Pack,

And I had practically just rejected him.

Shit.

------------
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Caine
description:
Caine is the Alpha of the Locus pack. Some say he’s strict, everyone knows he’s unforgiving, and most consider him cruel. After an incident three years ago that marked a very important part of his life, Caine decides to shut himself down from all emotion. Charlotte is a free spirit who relishes in being an easy going and friendly member of the Knight Pack. Thanks to a false accusation, Charlotte gets banished from her pack. Her Wolf has yet to make an appearance, and already Charlotte is left to wander around as a Rogue. Surely the Werewolf spirits wouldn’t pair the ruthless lonely Alpha with a lively outspoken girl who tries to live her life like a human….

title: Enemy Mate
description:
In the dangerous world of werewolves, apart from the small packs, there is only two major packs. These two packs have been enemies for centuries and are constantly at battle with each other. The Midnight Moon pack is the kind and caring pack of the North; Red Blood is the ruthless and unforgiving pack of the South.  

Charlotte Ava Moon belongs to the Midnight Moon pack. She's Alpha Midnight's only daughter and youngest child at the age of 17.   Ayden Red is the Alpha of the Red Blood pack. His parents died in the hands of Alpha Midnight only 3 years ago, when Ayden was 19. Ever since the death of his parents he has pledged revenge on the Midnight Moon pack, no matter what.  

What happens when Charlotte and Ayden discover they are mates on the middle of a battle field and Ayden drags her back to his pack?   Both packs struggle through there twists and turns attempting to have Charlotte in their hands, as Charlotte and Ayden have their own battle as they try to create a relationship out of the ashes they created.

*Currently being edited so there may be some errors later on

title: Thaddeus
description:
H e  w a s  r u t h l e s s 
S h e  w a s  s a s s y

H e  w a s  c r u e l 
S h e  w a s  s w e e t

H e  w a s  f e a r ed 
S h e  w a s  l o v e d.

....................................

" Darling raise your head" The  husky voice said to me as I continued to look at my feet, in which at the moment they seemed to be very interesting. " Darling I don't have all day." The husky voice continued. I didn't even need to lift my head to know who it was. 

He yanked my head upward with his hand on my chin. Trying to make me look in his eyes.
I kept mine shut. 

He grunted... I could feel the aura of power around him as I continued to disobey. 

" Darling I will not hesitate to kill you" He began speaking slow trying to steady his anger
" Then why haven't you killed me yet?" I asked, and made the worst decision I've ever made...
 I opened my eyes. 

At that moment only one word was going through my head, 

Mate.

*******

Scarlett Smith is an average 19 year old were-wolf. She's sweet and affectionate and as everyone says would make the perfect Luna. Except She's a Beta. But when Thaddeus Reynolds's  pack comes to kill and take the land Scarlett feels an odd sense of security. Until she realizes. 

He's her mate.

title: Over Again - TVD AU
description:
In which Rebekah Mikaelson is sent back in time to save her family as her dying wish.

Rebekah Mikaelson was dying.

She was alone and dying. The only family she had was her brother, Kol. Freya, Finn, Elijah, Niklaus and Henrik were all dead. There were only three Mikaelson's left, soon to be two.

Rebekah had lost her family, only her niece and one brother still alive. Marcel had left her not long after she had taken the cure, something she regretted. After spending over a thousand years wishing to be a human, she hated every second not being an original. Life sucked.

Most of the vampires in the world were dead, the witches wanted to take out the few remaining. Werewolves also pitted themselves against the vampires. Both beloved they were the superior species. Soon, vampires would cease to exist. 

In her final moments, Rebekah prayed. She prayed to every god she could think of, from every mythology that she had come across. She wanted to save her family,  give them better than what she did in the past. They all deserved better than what she gave them, she had betrayed each of them at least once. She wanted her brothers and sister alive. 

Unbeknownst to her, her prayers had been heard. What better than to send the dying Mikaelson back in the past.

Rebekah Mikaelson was dying, and then she wasn't.

THE VAMPIRE DIARIES & THE ORIGINALS AU
 a time travel au

title: Silent Heroes: Wildcat
description:
"What the hell?"

I took a step closer to the mirror, staring at my reflection in disbelief.  The person looking back was still me, but at the same time it wasn't.  I had the same thick, dark, curly hair.  The same hazel eyes.  The same olive skin with a light dusting of freckles (ugh) scattered across the bridge of my nose.

But my curls were now streaked with highlights.  And not the subtle, golden-brown ones that sometimes appeared during the summer.  No, these were an aggressive, dazzling blond that went from the roots of my hair all the way to the tips.  It looked like I had spent a full day getting my hair done in some upscale salon.  Never mind that I had never set foot in such a place since the day I was born.

My eyes appeared somehow wider and more luminous.  The colour brighter, my eyelashes darker up against them.  And, when I looked closely, my pupils seemed to be slitted almost like a cat.

I looked down at my body.  My skinny arms-which had always refused to gain any definition no matter how hard I exercised-were lined with flat, wiry muscles.  My bony shoulders were now curved and smooth.  My scrawny legs were toned like a dancer.  I reached down and lifted my shirt, revealing two subtle lines running vertically down my perfectly flat stomach, hinting at the rock-hard abs underneath.

My whole body was rippling with strength.  Like liquid steel.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Well, what's to tell?  I'm Canadian.  I grew up in rural southern Ontario surrounded by dozens of animals, including dogs, cats, horses, cows, fish, rabbits, guinea pigs, mice, rats (which got loose and infested the rabbit hutch), geese, chipmunks, squirrels, raccoon's and a millipede named milli.

I like reading and writing (of course).  I like travelling and collecting music from other countries.  I'm a little shy.  I used to be debilitatingly shy.   I'm writing a series called Unbrokenworld.  Oh, and I'm an identical twin!

Favorite Authors: J. K. Rowling, Suzanne Collins, Tamora Pierce, Dan Brown, Yann Martel, David Clement-Davies, Kenneth Oppel, K.A. Applegate, Orson Scott Card, Micheal Crichton, Robert J Sawyer, Linda Holeman, Jean M Auel, Nicholas Evans, Ishmael Beah, Raja Alsanea, Mark Mathabane, Bill Bryson and Colin Angus.

title: Unspoken ▹ Teen Wolf [01]
description:
❝Contrary to the popular belief, there's a very thin & fragile line between saying too much, and saying too little. More often than not, you'll find yourself unable to balance on that line & tipping to one side or the other, before inevitable falling. Whether or not there will be something there to catch you, that depends on how much was left unspoken.❞

There are things in life that we swear we'll never do. 

Some people pledge never to lie, others promise never to tell a secret; but of course, with a little time & persuasion, doing the action they vowed never to do is inevitable. Nearly everyone has made promises with a genuine sincerity in their hearts, only to later go & smash their promise to fragments with a sledgehammer- it's just what people do. No matter how hard they try & resist, if the thought remains bubbling in their mind for long enough, it's bound to boil over eventually 

Rachel Hale wanted to stay true to her promise. She swore she'd never go back to Beacon Hills after a fire killed nearly all of her family, yet when one of her two surviving siblings was brutally murdered within the confines of the town, she couldn't help herself; not after the arsonist who burned her life to the ground walked free. Alongside her older brother, Rachel went back to the damned town, & almost instantly fell head over heels into chaos- and took a whole lot of people with her. Before she even knew what hit her, she was fighting not only for her own life, but for the innocent people who didn't belong in a supernatural world like hers; innocent people she began to care more about than she was willing to admit. Unfortunately, for someone like Rachel who knows just how quickly everything she loves can be destroyed in a town like Beacon Hills, caring may turn out to be her biggest mistake. 

[Season 1 & 2]
© 2015 // Aly aka @insatiabIe

title: The Haunted Memories (Forgotten Series, #4)
description:
Life is full of ups and downs.
  
  Sorrel Lamar knows this very well. Five years ago she was happy at home with her parents, the beloved niece of a childless Alpha who had been grooming her to take his position since she first shifted. She was surrounded by incredible friends and loving family. Her twin sister, Magdalene, the most loving of them all.
  
  Then it all changed. They came in the night, a group of illegal rogues attacked the pack territory and when the pack was still reeling from the suddenness of the attack and the deaths that followed. The pack's greatest enemy struck at them viciously and without mercy until there was nothing left.
  
  Sorrel escaped with only her life intact. Everything else was simply... gone.
  
  Five years after she is now the Alpha of a territory she never asked for and is trying to put the pieces of the gutted pack together again. She is trying to bring the lost pack members together so the pack can once again be stable and have unity. It's a harsh battle to bring the pack from silence into truth but Sorrel is trying her best.
  
  She isn't sure which is more difficult though. The pack she is attempting to fix with limited knowledge. The vampire she saved three years previous. Her Beta who breaks the bones of males without provocation. Her Delta who snaps and snarls at anyone who attempts to approach him and his mate. Or the very fact of when she closed her eyes to sleep, she is bombarded with memories that are not her own and that she is always surprised to find she is still alive in the morning.
  
  That's because those haunted memories belong to someone who was killed, murdered to be exact. Sorrel doesn't know why she views these images while she sleep and she isn't sure how much longer she can take it. After all, in the memories she is forced to witness the last of her family dying over and over again and Sorrel knows one thing for certain. She can never change the past, no matter how badly she wants to save Magdalene.

title: keaton and his alpha mate
description:
keaton is adopted by his big sister Luna cassie and her mate alpha kane. there father jude white was abusive towards them but mainly luna cassie as she always protected keaton as he was only 5 at the time. His biological mother got killed by his own fathers hand so he doesnt remember her as he was a newborn at the time. keaton is a very loving and outgoing boy who came out to his family that he was gay at 15, he is now  18. 


future alpha damien is 19 years old. he has the second most powerful pack with alpha kanes pack being the first most powerful. he is very cold towards everyone apart from his mother, sister (who is also his beta mate) and beta jack he is not interested in finding his mate but also not interested in any female or male. all he wants to do is focus on becoming a great alpha and helping his mother out. He hates his father as his father cheats on his mother an awful lot which causes her physical and emotional pain, he would do anything to help his mother. not to mention his father also hates gays.

when alpha damiens father sends him, his mother, beta jack and Lucy to train with alpha blake what will he do when he realizes keaton is his mate? will he ignore him or will he claim him? what will keaton do when he realises alpha damien is his mate? what will they get a witch involved to break his mother and fathers bond?


This is also book number 3. If you have not read the first 2 books then please also go read them.

title: Rejected By The Prince | Ziall Mpreg
description:
"I don't want you, you're a lousy servant. Hell, I want you to die. Why would I want you? You're fat, ugly and a disgrace to the werewolf kind. YOU'RE A DOG!"

Niall watched his mate with tears in his eyes. This is why he didn't want him to find him. 

He knew that he would disappoint him. 

"I Zayn Javaad Malik crowned prince of werewolf's. Here by reject and ban you from this kingdom you're not allowed to join any pack."

"Please don't." Niall felt like a dagger was staking his heart. 

"But I want to ruin you first. " Zayn looked at Niall in anger hate and lust. 

Niall knew he couldn't deny his mate this. 

So what happens when Zayn is finished and Niall has to pack his things and go?

I wrote this a long time ago, and some aspects may not be great. Constructive criticism will be appreciated, just private message me☺️

title: Three Alphas, Three Mates
description:
In which a human, seventeen year old high school girl named Mia meets the love... I mean, loves(?) of her life? The male triplets who seem to almost own the town she's moved to are obsessed with her, for reasons beyond her grasp. She's convinced that she'll have to choose, but like everything else in this strange town, that might not be the case.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Shanice ▪  20  ▪ college student (Film major)

I write angsty, teen romance that makes you want to scream into your pillow from the feels xD between girls, guys, and every combination in between.

I want to capture the good and the bad. Not just of love but of life and lonliness and feeling like you need to make something of yourself. When you read my works, I want you to feel like you're IN them. I want everything to feel like it amounts to this one burning moment between you and the characters.

I write about simple moments that mean everything. That might be gone before you know it.

Realistic YA/NA

title: Tiger's Mate
description:
When a young werewolf finds himself unable to explain why he feels so much hate for the new mysterious classmate, curiosity and claws get the better of him and soon secrets that neither of them thought to have seen coming are revealed - along with a flood of questions, unexplainable feelings, and dangerous truths.

* * * 

Cold hearted werewolf Ethan Drayre was unrivalled with his cold intimidating personality and reputation for being one of the most dangerous guys in school. He never backed down from a challenge and never lost a fight. Almost everyone in the school knew not to mess with him.

Almost.

Because when new student - and rising talk of the school - Katski Black shows up one day, seemingly out of nowhere, there's an undeniably challenging aura about him that Ethan can't ignore. And quickly enough, a mutual feud is formed between the two of them that quickly brings problems on both sides.

But why does Ethan have a feeling there's more to Katski than he lets on? 

And what happens when discovering Katski's secret ends up dragging Ethan into more trouble than either or them ever bargained for?

It seems tigers and wolves aren't the only thing on the hunt...

[Temp. Title > still trying to think of something more creative ;D]

* * *

A/N
Includes: Werewolf/action/romance/humour/adventure/fiction/lgbtq/and swearing < blame Ethan (mostly)

This is more so just a story to vent fluff + plot XD
